DescCht:
Founded in 1990, 7-Leaders is a Solid Carbide Cutting Tools manufacture of End Mills, Drills and Reamers...etc. We have been providing high quality products and services all over the world.
The new plant which covers an area of 5,000㎡ is located in Taichung Industrial Park. The concept of the building is with transparency, green energy and wall-less design. The internal spaces can be accommodated with up to 150 sets of manufacturing equipment to meet the various requirements from the relevant industries of cutting tools & machinery fields.
All the solid carbide cutting tools manufactured by 7Leaders can be applied in the fields of Mold & Die, Machinery Parts, Automotive, Aerospace, 3C, Optical, Sport Equipment, and Medical Industry; and our products have been widely distributed in Europe, Asia, Central America, Brazil, and many other countries.

DescCht:
Ganzhou Achteck Tool Technology Co, Ltd. is a wholly owned subsidiary of Chongyi Zhangyuan Tungsten Co, Ltd. (Listed Company with stock code 002378). The registered capital of Achteck is 260 milion USD with 800 employees. The main products include Coated Carbide Inserts, Carbide Rod and supporting tool holders. Achteck is known for its outstanding R&D competence, production & testing equipment and its coated carbide insert production technology. Achteck produces inserts for Turning, Grooving, Milling and Drilling that are widely applied in automotive, energy, die & mold, general machinery, aerospace and other industries.

Achteck Tool is technology oriented, owns a strong research team that keeps on innovating Having "Benefits from Resources, Reliance on Technologies, Devotion to Humanity and Top with Trust" as the operating philosophy and "Safety, Harmony, Efficiency and Innovation" as the target

Achteck aims to become a well-known brand in the world and a first-class cemented carbide manufacturer in China.

DescCht:
Adrec Corp. is a Japanese manufacturer specializing in digital torque management solutions for manufacturing industries. Based in Niigata, Japan, we develop and supply wireless digital torque wrenches, torque data management systems, and manufacturing support software that improve tightening quality, traceability, poka-yoke, and operational efficiency.

Our digital torque wrench systems enable accurate torque measurement, real-time data collection, and reliable inspection control for assembly and maintenance operations. By integrating hardware and software, our solutions support error prevention, quality assurance, work standardization, and production data management on manufacturing sites.

We also provide software solutions for torque data analysis, inspection record management, work instruction support, and traceability control. Our systems can be connected with PCs, PLCs, and factory networks to support smart manufacturing and digital transformation initiatives.

Adrec products are used in a wide range of industries, including automotive, construction machinery, railway, industrial equipment, precision machinery, and maintenance services. Leveraging Japanese manufacturing expertise and practical field experience, we deliver reliable, user-friendly, and high-quality solutions that help manufacturers improve productivity and quality control.
ProductCategoryEn: Control, Measuring & Monitoring /Inspection Equipment

DescCht:
PRECISION FOR OVER 230 YEARS
ARNTZ is more than a company, we are a living piece of industrial history. Rooted in the Bergisches Land, the cradle of German metalworking, we stand as Remscheid’s oldest tool manufacturer and a seventh- generation family business, combining tradition with technological progress.
What began in 1793 has evolved into an internationally operating technology leader in high-performance band saw blades, with production facilities in Germany and the USA. Over two centuries of metalworking expertise are built into every product, forming the foundation for precision tools used in more than
80 countries worldwide. A striking example is the millimeter-accurate machining of the double T-beams for the One World Trade Center in the USA, carried out with band saw blades from ARNTZ.
Our solutions cover a broad range of applications, from cutting tubes and profiles to the precise machining of high-strength titanium forgings for medical implants. Every production step passes through a multi-stage control system to ensure consistently measurable top quality.
ProductCategoryEn: Blades,Sawing Machines

DescCht:
ATOKA, a core brand of Zhejiang Eagle Technology Co., Ltd., is a trusted manufacturer specializing in advanced precision metrology solutions. With over 16 years of experience in research and development, Eagle has established a strong foundation in delivering innovative and reliable measurement technologies to global industries.
ATOKA focuses on the integration of R&D, manufacturing, and technical services, offering a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance measurement systems, including Coordinate Measuring Machines (CMM), 2D–2.5D Optical Vision Measuring Machines (VMM), high-speed Flash Measurement Systems, as well as profile and surface roughness measuring instruments.
Designed to meet the increasing demands of modern manufacturing, ATOKA solutions enable fast, accurate, and repeatable measurement results, supporting quality control and production efficiency across industries such as automotive, electronics, precision engineering, mold and tooling, and medical devices.
Backed by nearly 80 patents and intellectual property rights—including invention patents, software copyrights, utility models, and industrial designs—Eagle demonstrates strong technological capabilities and a commitment to continuous innovation.
With a forward-looking vision, ATOKA is dedicated to delivering high-precision, efficient, and intelligent metrology solutions, empowering manufacturers worldwide to achieve higher standards of quality and performance.

DescCht:
AWEA MECHANTRONIC CO., LTD., established in 1986, is one of Taiwan's professional CNC machine manufacturers. The machine travel range spans from 510 mm all the way to 20,000 mm, inclusive of 5-axis, multi-face, vertical, horizontal, and other types of CNC machines. Especially for large-scale bridge type machines, they are widely recognized by the global market and enjoy the "Gantry Family" trademark.

In recent years, AWEA not only looks forward to the growth of 5-axis machining centers & automation solutions, but also strives to research and develop trunnion table and two axes milling head in-house to provide utmost processing abilities and immediate, reliable aftersales service.

In the face of turbulent geopolitical currents and rapid industrial transformations, the global economic framework is encountering unprecedented challenges. AWEA is deeply committed to fulfill corporate social responsibility, environmental commitments, and take ESG sustainability as opportunity for progress and inescapable responsibility as global citizens.

ExhibitorNameChs: BUSINESS COMMUNITY OF LONG HAU INDUSTRIAL PARK
DescCht:
Long Hau Corporation (LHC) is Vietnam’s leading industrial real estate developer, with deep expertise in developing and operating industrial parks. Strategically positioned where Ho Chi Minh City, the Mekong Delta, and Southeast Vietnam converge - with direct access to major expressways, ring roads, and the three key seaports of Cat Lai, Hiep Phuoc, and Long An International Port. We develop next-generation green industrial park models guided by ESG principles, integrating technical infrastructure, social amenities, and comprehensive service systems to harmonize industrial growth with quality living environments.

Our product portfolio includes industrial land, LEED-certified ready-built factories, build-to-suit factories, and hi-tech factories designed to optimize land efficiency while meeting global green transition demands. Long Hau Leed Park (LHLP), LHC’s flagship LEED-certified factory and warehouse development, sets the benchmark for sustainable industrial real estate near Ho Chi Minh City.

LHC’s development strategy extends beyond our home base in Can Giuoc Commune, Tay Ninh, to strategic expansion projects such as our Hi-tech Factory in Da Nang City - where urban planning, manufacturing, and industrial growth coexist seamlessly, benefiting both the workforce and the broader investment community.

We deliver optimal solutions across diverse sectors including automation, precision mechanics, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, food, consumer goods, and logistics, while facilitating collaboration among customers and service partners. Today, LHC has cultivated a thriving community of over 300 international corporations, attracting an expanding workforce to live and prosper in our developments.

ExhibitorNameChs: CHEN YING OIL MACHINE CO., LTD.
DescCht:
Leading Brand in Centralized Lubrication Systems
Founded in 1978, Chen Ying Oil Machine Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of Centralized Lubrication Systems, specializing in oil and grease lubrication solutions, such as manual and electric lubricators, pumps, distributors, and a complete range of accessories. With over 47 years of professional manufacturing experience, Chen Ying offers customized solutions tailored to diverse industrial applications, ensuring optimal machine performance, extended equipment life, and reduced maintenance costs.

Commitment to Integrity, Professionalism, and Quality
Chen Ying has always been committed to the business philosophy of "integrity, professionalism, and quality" and has always sourced the best quality parts and the most durable components within the assembly of each product. The company continually pursues excellence and faces every product challenge without compromise. This uncompromising approach has earned Chen Ying strong recognition and long-term trust from customers worldwide.

Professional R & D that Sustains an Eternal Leadership Position
Chen Ying has always been committed to engaging in innovative R & D. and has produced many newly-patented products, which can significantly reduce customer costs and enhance machinery equipment performance. With a strong engineering foundation, Chen Ying focuses on creating user-friendly, modular, and high-efficiency lubrication systems that meet the evolving needs of modern manufacturing and automation industries.

Your Reliable Partner in the Global Industry
Chen Ying serves a wide range of industries, including machine tools, automation, CNC machining, automation systems, and heavy-duty equipment. Its products are exported worldwide, with a strong presence in Asia, Europe, the United Sates, and the Middle East. As a trusted partner, Chen Ying is dedicated to building long-term collaborations and supporting customers with high-quality lubrication solutions on the global stage.
ProductCategoryEn: Process Automation Systems, Equipment, Materials & Accessories,Manufacturing Automation, Machinery, Equipment, Materials & Accessories

DescCht:
Chin Fong press is the biggest manufacturer of mechanical power press in Taiwan.
We were founded in 1948, rich in experience and have the most capable R&D group, worldwide service and sales net. Our presses are versatile and are highly customizable that we can reach customers’ changeable demands. Our products include C-Frame/Straight Side press, High Speed press, specialized Knuckle Press, Transfer Press, Servo Press, Tandem Line and Servo Press, with capacity from 25 tons~3200 tons.
Besides, we are capable of integrating automations and dies, realizing one-stop total solution.
Our presses are well circulated around the world and customers do not have to worry about after-market parts and after-service.

DescCht: CHUNLIN UNION CO ., established in 1993, is an affiliate of Minipan Ironworks. Initially set up to produce casings for Japanese processing equipment, it later focused on manufacturing small-scale food processing machinery and vacuum mixers for the chemical industry. In its mid-term, it specialized in customized machinery and refurbished used equipment, encompassing various industries including steel structures, metal cutting, plastic blow molding, and aluminum extrusion. Since 1998, it has been developing its own electrical control machinery plant, specializing in mechanical electrical control for over 20 years. In 2022, the family consolidated its brand companies and resources, merging Minipan and CHUNLIN, shifting to a brand-oriented business model, and establishing Shuang-Wei Precision Electromechanical Co., Ltd. as a key focus. Starting in 2023, it began collaborating with foreign manufacturers to jointly develop mechanical structures in Taiwan, conducting trials there, and developing its own brand of circular saws. It also acts as a distributor of band saws and related consumables and equipment.
ProductCategoryEn: Control, Measuring & Monitoring /Inspection Equipment,Metal Cutting Machines - Others

DescCht:
National Leader with Global Vision as an undisputed leader in the Turkish market, combines decades of local expertise with a massive manufacturing footprint. Our status as the #1 provider in Turkey is built on a foundation of trust, massive inventory capability, and a relentless pursuit of engineering excellence.

DescCht:
D&P TECH INC. is a premier manufacturer specializing in high-precision Diamond and CBN grinding wheels. With over a decade of proven export experience and technical expertise, we serve high-tech sectors including the semiconductor and aerospace industries. Through our local presence in Vietnam, we deliver rapid technical support and cost-effective tooling solutions to optimize our clients' manufacturing efficiency.

1. Industry : tool(Drill, Endmil, knife, etc) manufacturing, mold manufacturing (semiconductor, machinery, auto parts, etc.), ceramic manufacturing, diamond tool manufacturing
2. Workpiece application: Parts, tools(Carbide, Ceramic, SUS, HSS, etc), ceramic, steels(SKD, SK11, HSS), etc
3. Usage : Use to grind(polish) the surface of a tool or part to meet the required size (specification) and required surface roughness.

DescCht:
DHF is a professional cutting tool supplier established in 1999 located in Taiwan. We are specialized in producing HSC & HHC Solid Carbide End Mills. We constantly innovate and test our manufacturing techniques to improve our product competitiveness. Also, our quality control and production process are being carefully monitored with strict standard. Because of DHF's persistence, we can uphold our business principles: Outstanding quality, high efficiency, and high customer satisfaction.
DHF owns precise end mills measuring instrument, Rollomatic from Switzerland as our major processing equipment, Zoller's advanced endmill detector, and professional coating machine to ensure our quality stability. The unique tool identification system makes the quality control responsibilities during production more transparent, allowing us to quickly trace any question tools and effectively track the production and inspection process of each tool.
With a presence in over 50 countries worldwide, we offer 16 comprehensive product series tailored to meet diverse customer requirements.
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Jigs & Fixtures,Blades,Rollers,Material Handling & Storage

DescCht:
About DN Solutions and HELLER

Since its founding in 1976, DN Solutions has established itself as a leading global machine tool company, ranking as the world’s third-largest machine tool brand by revenue. By recently acquiring HELLER—a historic German manufacturer founded in Nürtingen in 1894—the company has significantly expanded its technological footprint and global manufacturing capabilities.

The integrated product portfolio now encompasses more than 400 product types. This includes DN Solutions' highly successful DNT, DNM, SMX, and DVF lines, renowned for their durability, precision, and rigidity, seamlessly complemented by HELLER’s state-of-the-art 4-axis and 5-axis machining centres, dynamic mill-turn centres, and special-purpose machines designed for highly productive series manufacturing.

Operating as a unified multinational force, the company meets the diverse and complex needs of customers across the automotive, aerospace, medical technology, energy, and semiconductor sectors. With HELLER’s four production facilities across Europe, Asia, and the Americas, alongside DN Solutions’ robust network of over 140 dealers in 66 countries, the combined group guarantees dependable supply and localized expertise in all key markets.

Driven by a shared vision for the future, DN Solutions and HELLER provide not only high-end physical machining solutions but also advanced digital manufacturing platforms like CUFOS, modular services, and highly productive automation systems, paving the way toward the future of intelligent production.

ExhibitorNameChs: Dongguan  Binsen Hardware and Plastics Co.,Ltd
DescCht:
Established in 2013 and headquartered in Houjie Town, Dongguan, China, Dongguan Binsen Hardware and Plastics Co., Ltd. operates from a modern 16,000 m² facility. With over 200 dedicated professionals, including experienced engineers and quality control specialists, Binsen specializes in integrated precision manufacturing solutions.

Core Business Divisions:

Injection Molding Division: Offers comprehensive services from mold design to mass production, utilizing advanced equipment. Annually delivers over 260 precision molds, ensuring efficiency, rapid response, and consistent quality.
Metal Stamping and Tooling Division: Provides professional one-stop solutions for precision metal components, including mold engineering and high-volume stamping production. Also delivers over 260 metal mold sets annually with mature technology and reliable standards.
Parts Processing Division: Serves as the central manufacturing hub, employing automated CNC systems and smart management for high-precision part machining.
Products & Applications: Capabilities span precision connectors, automotive components, medical devices, and aviation parts, serving demanding industries like automotive, industrial, aerospace, and communications globally.

Quality Commitment: Adheres to a stringent quality policy ("High-standard, High Requirement, All-digital Control, Full Participation") and holds certifications including IATF 16949:2016, ISO 9001:2015, and ISO 14001:2015.

Vision: To become the preferred supplier for high-end connector customers, leveraging expertise in precision, specialization, and cutting-edge technology to be a trusted global manufacturing partner.
ProductCategoryEn: Die Casting Machines,Mould and Die

DescCht: UNION Brush - Eang Lian Corporation, was established in 1985 as an experienced manufacturer, specializing in full range of industrial brushes in Taiwan. With own brand, UNION Brush is widely recognized and trusted by distributing around the world. UNION provide full range industrial brushes for your special applications. Our popular product range covers power brush and strip brush, roller brush and non-woven FM rolls, super finishing and precision brush, deburring and grinding brush, sanding brush and anti-static conductive brush, professional HTA brush and professional honing brush... Idea used for cleaning, brushing, grinding, deburring, polishing and drilling. Our brushes are designed feasible for several applications and equipment. For instance, air and electric grinders, portable grinders, power or air tool, hand tool, sander, band saw sharpener, large roller brush for washing and oiling, PCB brushes for electrics industry, anti-static brush for IC function test in semiconductor industry, surface cleaning after acid pickling for steel industry, aluminum and aluminum-magnesium alloy deburring. All kinds of professional brushes are available for CUSTOM-MADE.
ProductCategoryEn: Boring / Drilling / Tapping Machines,Gear Cutting,Rollers,Metal Cutting Machines - Others

DescCht:
Echaintool Precision Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of CNC cutting tools, providing a comprehensive range of solutions for metalworking applications. Our product portfolio includes turning tool holders, indexable inserts for threading, grooving and parting-off, U-drills, coolant-through carbide drills, and solid carbide end mills.

Serving industries such as general machining, automotive, aerospace, energy, and precision engineering, Echaintool is committed to delivering reliable tooling performance for a wide variety of materials including steel, stainless steel, and cast iron.

More than just a cutting tool supplier, Echaintool focuses on solving real machining challenges. By combining practical application experience with advanced tool design, we help customers improve machining stability, extend tool life, and enhance overall productivity. Our goal is to reduce cost per component while ensuring consistent and high-quality results.

With flexible production capabilities and efficient supply support, Echaintool responds quickly to market demands and provides dependable service to global partners, including distributors and end users.

Echaintool is also committed to sustainable and environmentally friendly manufacturing. Through optimized tool design, extended tool life, and efficient resource utilization, we help reduce waste, lower energy consumption, and support more sustainable production processes.

We believe that cutting tools are not only products, but key elements in optimizing manufacturing processes. Echaintool continues to develop innovative and practical solutions to support sustainable and competitive production in modern industries. Overseas agents wanted.
ProductCategoryEn: Blades

DescCht:
We specialize in the development and manufacturing of advanced fluid transfer solutions. Our products are designed to support demanding industrial applications, including the transfer of high-temperature liquids, chemicals, and high-viscosity fluids, where reliability and durability are essential.

In addition to pumping technologies, we provide integrated solutions for liquid recovery, filtration, and water treatment, including automatic pH neutralization systems. Our solutions are highly valued for their compact design, efficient installation, and reliable operation, enabling customers to optimize space, enhance productivity, and maintain stable process control.

DescCht: Festo is a global player and an independent family-owned company with headquarters in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany. Festo has set standards in industrial automation technology and technical education ever since its establishment, thereby making a contribution to sustainable development of the environment, the economy and society. The company supplies pneumatic and electrical automation technology to 300,000 customers of factory and process automation in over 35 industries. The LifeTech sector with medical technology and laboratory automation is becoming increasingly important. The products and services are available in 176 countries. With about 20,700 employees in over 250 branch offices in 61 countries worldwide, Festo achieved a turnover of around €3.36 billion in 2021. Each year around 7% of this turnover is invested in research and development. In this learning company, 1.5 % of turnover is invested in basic and further training. Festo Didactic SE is a leading provider of technical education and training and offers its customers worldwide comprehensive digital and physical learning solutions in the industrial environment.

Headquartered in Varese, Italy, FICEP is the leading manufacturer of machine tools for the steel construction fabrication industry with customers in nearly 90 countries globally. The company provides the world's widest range of machines for both the structural steel and the forging industries.

DescCht:
Gerardi is a leading European company, globally recognized for the quality and reliability of its clamping and industrial automation solutions. Founded to deliver precision modular vises for the most demanding machining needs, Gerardi stands out for its excellent price-to-quality ratio, offering high performance at competitive costs.

Its precision modular vises are designed to cover most workshop clamping requirements at the lowest possible cost and are supported by a 5-year warranty.
The Gerardi system includes a wide range of interchangeable vises, spacers, jaws, and inserts, ensuring flexible and customizable solutions for different applications.

Gerardi is also a key reference in the production of tombstones for horizontal machines, offering one of the widest ranges on the market. Its modular ecosystem also features the Zero Point system for fast setup, changing, and positioning of equipment, significantly reducing downtime and improving productivity, enabling turnkey clamping solutions for any requirement.

Another core strength is the production of high-performance angular heads for both CNC and conventional machines, as well as driven tools for CNC lathes.
These solutions, enabling milling, drilling, and tapping operations, are highly valued for their precision and reliability, particularly in aerospace, automotive, and other high-precision industries.

In recent years, Gerardi has expanded into automation with its ROBI system for automatic production changeover. The portfolio now also includes robotic grippers, automatic vises, and automatic Zero Point systems, representing advanced industrial automation and enabling highly efficient production management with reduced setup times.

Today, Gerardi remains a strategic global partner, delivering innovative, precise, and reliable solutions while continuously investing in technology and customer-focused innovation.
ProductCategoryEn: Jigs & Fixtures,Manufacturing Automation, Machinery, Equipment, Materials & Accessories,Workholding Device

Established in 1975, GOODWAY Machine Corp. is one of Taiwan’s leading CNC lathe manufacturers. With operations in Taichung, Chiayi, Los Angeles, and Suzhou, and our marketing network covers 45 countries and regions with 60 professional distributors.

Our product line includes over 600 models of multi-axis, vertical, horizontal, and SWISS type turning centers, as well as high-precision cylindrical grinding machines. Our machining solutions serve industries such as aerospace, automotive, energy, electronics, and heavy machinery.

DescCht:
For 100 years, GROB has been a pioneer in the development and manufacture of highly innovative production and automation systems in the field of machining and electromobility. Our customers include the world's most renowned automotive manufacturers, their suppliers and many other well-known companies from various industries. The portfolio ranges from universal machining centers to highly complex manufacturing systems with their own automation solutions to fully automated assembly lines. In addition, the product range includes production systems for electric motors and assembly lines for battery technology (cell, module, pack).
From Bavaria into the wider world: As a global, family-managed company, we have been developing manufacturing systems and machine tools since being established in Munich in 1926 and are still on a growth course. Our customers include the world's leading automotive manufacturers, their component suppliers and other renowned companies from diverse sectors. We invariably guarantee the best possible quality through our production facilities in Germany, Brazil, China, USA and Italy, as well as our worldwide service centers and sales branches.

DescCht:
Carbide insert Manufacturer
GUASS SPECIAL METAL PRODUCTS CORP. established in 1990 as a Carbide Insert Manufacturer, specializes in the field of tungsten carbide forming and sintering. In 1993, we began producing carbide inserts, offering high-quality and stable milling options for CNC milling machines. During this period, we received extensive positive feedback and earned the trust and praise of our customers. Consequently, we have actively and continuously developed our range of carbide inserts to meet the diverse demands of various industries, including aviation, plastics, machinery, food, automotive, electronics, and more, many of which are now our partners.

In the past few decades, in addition to obtaining the ISO system quality assurance (AFAQ certification of 9001 2000 Bell of France), we also have never stopped investing in each new equipment, all for the purpose of supplying high & stable quality carbide inserts to the industry, supporting customers the smooth and stable production, and built a long-term and stable cooperative relations. Be ahead of the generation change.

Therefore, Guass factory can provide all kinds of "turning inserts, milling inserts, drilling inserts, boring inserts, grooving inserts, cutting inserts" and all kinds of special shapes of carbide products. We adhere to "quality, technology, service" as our main business policy, believing that as long as we cooperate with customer requirements and create industry profits together, it will be able to achieve a win-win direction for all three, and expand the business to all worldwide.
ProductCategoryEn: Blades

DescCht: Hanzhong Hanjiang Tools Co., Ltd. is located in the historical and cultural city of Hanzhong, Shaanxi, nestled at the southern foot of the Qinling Mountains by the Han River.as high-tech enterprise specializing in the research, development, and manufacturing of precision and complex cutting tools, the company's core products are precision and complex gear cutting tools, primarily including hobbing tools, shaper tools, skiving tools, shaving tools, broaching tools, and milling tools, with technical capabilities and scale leading the industry. The company possesses core technologies in precision and complex cutting tools, along with advanced manufacturing capabilities. Every aspect, from product design, processes, manufacturing, market positioning, to on-site management, is meticulously refined to achieve perfection. Each critical process is equipped with state-of-the-art, high-precision, and sophisticated production machinery imported from countries such as Germany, Switzerland, the United States, Japan, and Italy, including CNC tool measurement centers and other advanced measuring instruments. The company employs German tool heat treatment technology, Swiss Balzers composite coating production lines, domestically developed high-precision CNC equipment, and self-researched and modified specialized machines, steadily enhancing its tool manufacturing standards.

ExhibitorNameChs: Hebei Zhenyaohong Automation Equipment Co., Ltd.
DescCht:
Top Tech is a Chinese group with three subsidiaries: Hebei Zhenyaohong, Tianjin Rich Star, and V Top Tech Vietnam.
Zhenyaohong, based in Botou, China's mold capital, has 16 years of expertise in automotive stamping dies, fixtures, and automation equipment. With CAE like Autoform and BIW die tryout lines, it serves 72 OEMs including Ford, Volvo, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Toyota, with over 20 A-tier suppliers, holding National High-tech Enterprise and military certifications.
Rich Star, based in Tianjin (22,000 m², 160 employees), specializes in die design and sheet metal stamping and welding, producing 200 die sets and 20 million parts annually for Mercedes-Benz, Toyota, Honda, Great Wall, with National High-tech Enterprise and Tianjin Enterprise Technology Center certifications.
V Top Tech Vietnam, features ABB 7-axis robotic lines producing 3.5 million parts annually with localized support.
The group delivers full-process solutions from design to delivery for clients worldwide.
ProductCategoryEn: Mould and Die

DescCht:
HEIDENHAIN: Measurement and control technology for demanding positioning tasks

DR. JOHANNES HEIDENHAIN GmbH develops and produces linear encoders, angle encoders, rotary encoders, and CNC controls for demanding positioning tasks. Rounding out its product portfolio are touch probes, camera systems, length gauges, digital readouts, signal converters, testing devices, and inspection devices. What's more, its practical software solutions for the Digital Shop Floor empower end users to fully digitalize their manufacturing ecosystem.

HEIDENHAIN products are primarily used in high-accuracy machine tools as well as manufacturing and processing systems for electronic components. Thanks to its extensive expertise in developing and manufacturing encoders and controls, HEIDENHAIN is in an excellent position to automate the production machines and systems of tomorrow, supplying a number of critical and innovative industries, including machine tools, electronics, robotics, medical technology, elevators, and metrology.

Thanks to its extensive expertise in developing and manufacturing encoders and controls, HEIDENHAIN is in an excellent position to automate the production machines and systems of tomorrow, supplying a number of critical and innovative industries, including machine tools, electronics, robotics, medical technology, elevators, and metrology.

DescCht:
Honor Seiki Co., Ltd. continues to develop quality CNC Vertical lathe and Vertical turning center to meet the highest standards in precision, efficiency, and reliability.
Honor Seiki was founded in 1987, with more than 35 years of experience in VTL machine design and manufacturing. HONOR SEIKI is the most professional, leading brand, machine tool provider which has international quality certificates and well reputation in the fields of CNC Vertical Lathe and Turnkey solutions in Taiwan.

Honor Seiki adapted the dual channels of standard VTL and industry solutions to increase its market share. The strength of Honor Seiki is customized design to meet the user’s requirements such as special jigs & fixtures, and robotic loading & unloading to increase both volume and quality of mass production. The worldwide patent “Solid Lock" clamping System and “Roller Gear Transmission System” are our capabilities.

We mainly focus on the production of Vertical lathes and strive to do it well.

Achieving and fulfilling customers’ satisfaction is our mission. We are proud of providing our machines to many leading companies around the world. The main application fields of Honor’s machine are the aerospace industry, defense industry, automotive industry, railway industry, mining industry, oil, and gas industry, wind energy, and so on.
Continuing improvement is the unrelenting mission of Honor Seiki. Based on the concepts of Sustainable management, High Quality, High Efficiency, Well-Accuracy, Honesty, and Responsibility are our promises to cooperative partners.
ProductCategoryEn: Boring / Drilling / Tapping Machines,Grinding Machines,Lathes,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Milling Machines,Machining Centres

DescCht: We at Honsberg Metallsägen GmbH are passionate about precision and innovation in saw blade manufacturing. Based in Remscheid, Germany, we specialize in high quality cutting tools that professionals rely on worldwide. Our dedication to craftsmanship and advanced technology has made us a trusted name in the German tool industry. Through our headquarters, branches, and global partnerships, we ensure that our saw blades meet the highest standards. We take pride in providing expert service and continuous training for our team and partners, helping industries tackle cutting challenges efficiently. At Honsberg, we don’t just create tools—we provide solutions that empower professionals in their daily work.

ExhibitorNameChs: HYOSUNG VINA INDUSTRIAL MACHINERY COMPANY LIMITED
DescCht:
Hyosung Vina Industrial Machinery Company Limited (HSVIM) is a foreign-invested enterprise in Vietnam, specializing in the manufacturing of electrical equipment such as motors and inverters. With strong export activities to South Korea, Southeast Asia, and other international markets, HSVIM plays a vital role in the global industrial machinery supply chain.
Established in July 2022, the company operates from Nhon Trach V Industrial Park, Dong Nai City, a strategic location that supports efficient production and logistics. HSVIM combines advanced technology, engineering expertise, and strict quality standards to deliver reliable products that meet the demands of modern industries.
Backed by significant investment capital and guided by experienced leadership, HSVIM is committed to:
- Innovation in electrical machinery manufacturing
- Sustainability through efficient production practices
- Global integration by expanding exports and strengthening partnerships across Asia and beyond
With its rapid growth and dedication to excellence, Hyosung Vina Industrial Machinery Company Limited continues to establish itself as a trusted partner for industrial solutions worldwide.

DescCht:
Idemitsu is the leading lubricant manufacturer from Japan, established through over 100 years of experience.

As the visionary curator of eco-friendly automotive lubricants, we are committed to finding effective solutions that cater to both our customers and the environment. Idemitsu takes pride in being on the forefront of innovation. Our state-of-the-art laboratories have stringent quality controls in place to ensure that our comprehensive range of premium products surpasses the Original Equipment Manufacturer(OEM) quality requirements for most Japanese car manufacturers.

Idemitsu’s powerful yet economical lubricants have been trusted by customers for generations. Groundbreaking advancements like the low viscosity engine oils allow for outstanding fuel economy, while excellent oxidation stability lessens oil change frequency. With continual refinement, it is our goal to achieve the perfect balance between maximum power and energy conservation.
ProductCategoryEn: Lubricants & Chemicals

IKO Products Supporting Technology Development
IKO (Nippon Thompson) developed Needle Roller Bearings first time in Japan using its own technology,
and used that advanced technology as a foundation for entering into the field of linear motion rolling guides (Linear Way Series and Mechatronics Series).
Currently, we are supporting the development of technology with the first-of-its-kind C-Lube Maintenance Free Series and a rich array of other creative products that respond to diversifying customer needs.

DescCht:
Innse-Berardi, part of Camozzi Group, is based in Brescia. Specializing in the engineering, production, and commissioning of high-tech and best-performing machine tools, it serves as a benchmark for the heavy mechanical industries, such as Energy (Oil & Gas, nuclear, wind), Transportation (railway, marine, automotive), and Aerospace.

Innse-Berardi offers a comprehensive range of products suitable for various application sectors. The Atlas series includes vertical multitasking machining centers, whereas the Aries series comprises advanced horizontal boring and milling machines, both equipped with either hydrostatic or mechanical technologies. Additionally, the PowerMax® family specializes in high-speed milling and trimming of large, complex-geometry parts in aluminum, titanium, and hard metals. This extensive product line establishes Innse-Berardi as a strategic and reliable technological partner, providing turnkey solutions based on deep experience in processing complex components.

In response to the requirements of Industry 4.0, Innse-Berardi's machines are engineered to enable the integration of production lines into a connected digital system. IBNET and IBRM are the digital platforms developed by Innse-Berardi in collaboration with Camozzi Digital to enhance production management, monitoring operating conditions and include predictive maintenance.
ProductCategoryEn: Boring / Drilling / Tapping Machines,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Milling Machines,Machining Centres

DescCht:
Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli SpA established in 1921 are based in the North of Italy on Lake Maggiore. For more than 80 years RETTIFICATRICI GHIRINGHELLI S.p.A. have developed a range of high-tech centreless grinding machines which find applications in various fields of manufacturing i.e. automotive, bearings, electric motors, aerospace, household appliances, hydraulics, tools, medical, textile. Ghiringhelli centreless grinding machines are CNC controlled and are capable of being utilized as standalone units or linked into automatic lines. They are equipped with specific tooling according to customers’ requirements and are suitable for plunge grinding multi diameter components or through feed grinding of plain cylindrical components.
For years committed to act according to the ESG Environmental Social and Governance principles of sustainability, Rettificatrici Ghiringhelli has adopted several solutions to improve the production efficiency of its centreless grinding machines and optimize the use of raw materials and resources with particular attention to the Circular Economy too.
ProductCategoryEn: Grinding Machines

DescCht:
INDEX - better.parts.faster.

With its INDEX and TRAUB brands, the INDEX Group is today one of the world’s leading manufacturers of CNC turning machines. The Company Group in Esslingen has 80 sites worldwide with 6 production sites and 12 international sales and service companies as well as an extensive retailer network.

Progress has a long tradition
INDEX-Werke were set up in 1914 by Hermann Hahn who began that year with the production of automatic turret turning machines. He was a Swabian entrepreneur through and through who laid the foundation for an impressive development with creative ideas and an aspiration for quality. Within four decades, more than 20,000 turning machines had been sold and these formed the basis for the excellent reputation of INDEX around the world. In 1975, INDEX began with the production of multi-spindle turning machines. A few years later, the company entered the market for CNC technology. And INDEX soon assumed a pioneering role here. After the death of Eugen Hahn, the son of the company’s founder, 85% of the company shares were put into a foundation. In 1992, INDEX presented a new generation of turn-mill centers based on a modular component system. In 1997, TRAUB Drehmaschinen GmbH & Co. KG from neighboring Reichenbach/Fils was taken over and integrated into the INDEX Group. The company pursues a two-brand strategy to this very day.
ProductCategoryEn: Lathes,Machining Centres
DescEn:

DescCht:
ISHAN's core value is Honesty, Efficiency, and Innovation. Our quality policy is to achieve Quality First, pursue Advanced Technology, and meet Customer Satisfaction.

Ishan Precision Industrial Co., Ltd was established in Taichung, Taiwan in 1992, has been continuously researching and developing centralized lubrication systems, become the leading manufacturer in Taiwan. Ishan Precision provides lubrication system is widely applied on industrial machinery like, CNC machine center, lathes, grinding machine, plastic injection machine, forging machine, woodworking machine, and so on. Ishan Precision also can provide customers with the reliable lubrication system specifically tailored for their production purposes.

Ishan Precision's quality assurance program is approved by ISO-9001 standards, and electrical lubricator lines are certified with CE Safety Certification via TÜV. Currently, Ishan supplies global market demands through its production facilities in Taichung, Taiwan. Just as Taiwan's machinery is established throughout the global markets, Ishan expects that we will become a partner of the supplier chain for global customers, and contribute to mutual success, as well as constructs global sales network of ISHAN products with potential distributors. We look forward to building business relationship with you with our best pleasure, and please contact us!
ProductCategoryEn: Power Transmission – Hydraulic equipment and systems,Power Transmission – Pneumatics equipment and systems,Power Transmission – Pumps & Valves

DescCht:
ITALIAN MANUFACTURING TECHNOLOGIES (IMT) Vietnam is a network agreement among a group of Italian companies, manufacturers of machine tools willing to share their objectives and strategies, strengthening their presence in the Vietnamese market and in ASEAN region, through an office with a local team dedicated to promotional activities.
IMT Vietnam allows member companies to have stable presence in the market, providing to the Vietnamese industry the opportunity to interact directly with member companies through their local office.
Vietnamese companies can consider IMT as their first point of reference in Vietnam and get immediate answer/feedback to their queries from the respective Italian companies.
The main objectives of IMT are promoting the brands of IMT companies and the IMT trademark; supporting the setting up of a constant market presence; carrying out promotional initiatives aimed at increasing the visibility of IMT companies, like the participation at the most important trade exhibitions in Vietnam, the organization of seminars and workshops, B2B meetings.
President of IMT Vietnam is Mrs. Barbara Colombo (Managing Director of FICEP) who has assigned to GWA Asia (www.gwa-asia.com) the management of IMT activities and administration. This innovative project is promoted by UCIMUSISTEMI PER PRODURRE (the Italian machine tools, robots and automation manufacturers’ Association – www.ucimu.it).

DescCht:
We are engaged in the circuit board assembly business, handling electronic components.
The company was founded in 1976 and is celebrating its 50th anniversary this year. In 2024, it also established a factory in Dong Nai City, Vietnam.
As an electronics manufacturing services (EMS) provider, we deliver products to a wide range of customers.
We primarily handle industrial and medical equipment, and while we don't have our own products, we have engineers who can design enclosures and circuit boards, so we can handle development requests from the ground up.
We can also procure components such as electronic parts, harnesses, and enclosures from a variety of suppliers.
We can provide development, parts procurement, and manufacturing services as a complete package, and we can also start from the stage requested by the customer.
Our Vietnam factory, established in 2024, also introduced PCB assembly equipment and began production in 2025.
With production bases in Japan and Vietnam, we will continue our activities to meet our customers' needs.
ProductCategoryEn: Industrial Robotics,Manufacturing Automation, Machinery, Equipment, Materials & Accessories

As an electronics manufacturing services (EMS) provider, we deliver products to a wide range of customers.
We primarily handle industrial and medical equipment, and while we don't have our own products, we have engineers who can design enclosures and circuit boards, so we can handle development requests from the ground up.
We can also procure components such as electronic parts, harnesses, and enclosures from a variety of suppliers.
We can provide development, parts procurement, and manufacturing services as a complete package, and we can also start from the stage requested by the customer.
Our Vietnam factory, established in 2024, also introduced PCB assembly equipment and began production in 2025.
With production bases in Japan and Vietnam, we will continue our activities to meet our customers' needs.
ProductCategoryCht: Robot Công nghiệp,Sản xuất tự động hóa, máy móc, thiết bị, nguyên vật liệu & phụ tùng

Jiangsu Jiayite Hydraulics CO,Ltd. is located in Jiangsu Province. It is a nationalization enterprise, provincial specialized new enterprise and enterprise technology center specializing in the production of various hydraulic components.The company covers an area of To thousand square meter and has more than 600 sets of various production equipment,including testing devices,CNC, high precision grinders, etc.
There are more than 500 employees of which engineers account for about 10%.And obtained IS09001: 2015 quality management system certification, IS0 1400:2015 environmental management system certificate, IS045001: 2018 occupational health and safety management system certificate,CE,ect. The self owned brand "REKITH" can provide cost effective products to enhance customers' market competitiveness. The company's annual output of hydraulic valves is more than 10 thousand pieces and has complete industrial hydraulic valves. Our products are widely used in machine tools plastic machines, agricultural machinery, metallurgy, construction machinery, and other industries, the products are exported to more than 40 countries.

ExhibitorNameChs: Jiangsu Sakoside Intelligent Machinery Technology Co., LTD.
DescCht:
Jiangsu Sakoside Intelligent Machinery Technology Co., Ltd. is located in the beautiful and prosperous coastal city of Nantong, Jiangsu Province. The company is situated in the central southern part of Jiangsu Province and is a hub city by the river and the sea, with convenient transportation and superior geographical location.

The company was established in 2018, covering a total area of 30000 square meters, with strong technical strength and advanced production equipment. Focusing on innovative products such as intelligent circular saw machines, high-speed band saws, and high-speed cutting and milling machines, we are an enterprise that integrates scientific research and development, production and manufacturing, and technical services and consulting.

Sakoside will deeply cultivate the field of intelligent machinery and move towards the goal of leading the industry. The company adheres to the core values of "Intelligent Future, Craftsmanship and Precision". Driven by intelligent technology, we integrate innovative spirit into every production process and are committed to building an outstanding brand in the field of intelligent machinery.

DescCht:
JJ TOOLS is a South Korea-based manufacturer specializing in high-performance cutting tools for the metalworking industry. Since its establishment, the company has focused on delivering reliable tooling solutions through continuous investment in technology, quality control, and product development.

Our product portfolio includes solid carbide end mills, drills, thread mills, reamers, carbide inserts, PCD/CBN tools, and customized tooling solutions for a wide range of machining applications. JJ TOOLS serves customers in various industries, including automotive, aerospace, mold & die, medical, energy, and general precision engineering.

With advanced manufacturing facilities and strict quality management systems, JJ TOOLS is committed to providing consistent product quality, competitive lead times, and technical support to customers worldwide. The company continuously expands its product range and manufacturing capabilities to meet the evolving demands of modern machining environments.

Today, JJ TOOLS exports its products to distributors and end users across Asia, Europe, North America, the Middle East, and other global markets. Through close cooperation with its partners, JJ TOOLS strives to build long-term business relationships based on trust, innovation, and mutual growth.

Our mission is to provide cost-effective and reliable cutting tool solutions that enhance machining performance and productivity for customers around the world.
ProductCategoryEn: Blades

DescCht: K.N. BONDS VIETNAM is a Japanese wire harness manufacturing company established in 2020 in the KIZUNA 3 Industrial Park in the former Long An Province of Vietnam. As a joint venture between Kotera Manufacturing Co., Ltd., a manufacturing company with over 30 years of experience, and Nakajima Electric Co., Ltd., a comprehensive electrical materials trading company with over 75 years of history, the company achieves a balance between Japanese quality and local costs. With a production system capable of handling small lots to mass production and flexible response to short delivery times, we provide “quality unchanged from Japan” in Vietnam.

DescCht:
KAIAN (VIETNAM) NEW MATERIALS Co., Ltd. is the Vietnamese subsidiary of Jiangxi Kaian New Materials Group Co., Ltd. , a leading manufacturer of copper and copper alloy products in China.
As the Group's strategic presence in Southeast Asia, KSPARK Vietnam focuses on the import, distribution, and trading of high-quality non-ferrous metal materials, serving customers across Vietnam and neighboring markets.
Supported by the advanced manufacturing capabilities of our parent company, we specialize in the supply of:
• Copper Strip
• Copper Busbar
• Brass Wire
• Brass Alloy Electrode Wire
• Copper and Brass Semi-Finished Products
• Other Non-Ferrous Metal Materials

DescCht:
CÔNG TY TNHH KANEFUSA VIỆT NAM là chi nhánh của Kanefusa Corporation – tập đoàn Nhật Bản với hơn 120 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực sản xuất dụng cụ cắt công nghiệp. Kế thừa nền tảng công nghệ tiên tiến và tiêu chuẩn chất lượng khắt khe từ Nhật Bản, Kanefusa cung cấp các giải pháp cắt tối ưu cho nhiều ngành như cơ khí, kim loại, gỗ và vật liệu công nghiệp.
TẠI VIỆT NAM, CÔNG TY CHUYÊN CUNG CẤP:
+ Lưỡi cưa đĩa hợp kim: cắt gỗ, nhôm, thép, inox,..
+ Dụng cụ cắt gọt: dao phay, mũi khoan, dao bào,...
+ Dịch vụ khác: sữa chữa lưỡi cưa chất lượng tốt.

NĂNG LỰC CÔNG NGHỆ & GIÁ TRỊ KHÁC BIỆT
Kanefusa nổi bật với:
+ Công nghệ xử lý nhiệt và vật liệu tiên tiến giúp tăng độ bền và độ sắc bén
+ Công nghệ giảm rung và tối ưu bề mặt cắt
+ Thiết kế giúp tiết kiệm năng lượng và chi phí sản xuất

CAM KẾT ĐỒNG HÀNH CÙNG NGÀNH SẢN XUẤT
Với định hướng phát triển bền vững, Kanefusa không chỉ cung cấp sản phẩm mà còn mang đến giải pháp toàn diện giúp khách hàng:
+ Tăng năng suất sản xuất
+ Nâng cao chất lượng bề mặt gia công
+ Giảm chi phí vận hành
+ Hướng tới sản xuất thân thiện môi trường
ProductCategoryEn: Blades

DescCht:
KGK at MTA 2026 – Precision Machining & Smart Manufacturing Solutions

KGK is pleased to announce our participation in MTA 2026, where we will showcase advanced machine tools and solutions from leading Japanese manufacturers. This year, our focus is on precision machining, productivity improvement, and smart monitoring technologies for modern manufacturing.

Featured products at our booth include:
• Kuroda Seiko – Precision Rotary Surface Grinder (GSR-600)
Delivering high accuracy, excellent surface finish, and stable performance for precision components.
• Takamatsu Machinery – CNC Lathe (AT-1)
A compact and powerful machine designed for high-speed, high-precision mass production.
• Kitagawa – Power Chuck
Ensuring strong, stable, and accurate workholding for a wide range of machining applications.
• Yamamoto Metal – Wireless Acceleration Sensor “b-lex”
Enables real-time vibration monitoring to optimize performance and reduce downtime (planned integration with Takamatsu AT-1).
• NT TOOL – Quick Change Adapter for CNC Lathe
Reduces setup time and improves operational efficiency with fast tool changes.
• Adcole – Crankshaft Measuring System (Panel Display)
Advanced measurement solution ensuring high accuracy and quality control for critical components.

⸻

Visit KGK at MTA 2026 to explore how our solutions can enhance your manufacturing capabilities. Our experts are ready to provide demonstrations and technical consultation.

KGK – Your Partner in Precision and Innovation.

DescCht:
We deliver Japanese-quality plating in Vietnam!

Keiden Vietnam Co., Ltd. is a Japanese-owned plating company located near Ho Chi Minh City.

Our parent company has been providing plating services for automotive parts, electronic components, precision machinery parts, and more in Japan for 60 years.

Based on our parent company's technology and experience, we offer Japanese-quality plating in Vietnam.

With Japanese engineers and a technical team highly trained in Japan, we deliver the highest quality plated products to our customers.

Our goal is to become the number one plating company in Vietnam and to be a cornerstone of Vietnamese manufacturing.

DescCht: Kokusai Dengyo Co., Ltd. is an electrical and electronic equipment manufacturer headquartered in Nagoya City, Aichi Prefecture, Japan. It develops and manufactures products for a wide range of fields, including industrial and medical equipment. Established in 1953, the company leverages its long-cultivated technological expertise to develop its business primarily in the automation sector. Its main business activities include the manufacturing and sales of control components such as foot switches and solenoids, which are used in various fields including machine tools and medical equipment.

DescCht:
KTC (VIETNAM) Co., Ltd., located in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, specializes in high precision rubber molding.
Since our establishment in 1995, we have grown as a Japan-affiliated manufacturer deeply rooted in the local community.
Over the years, we have expanded from precision rubber molded products and rollers to a wide range of advanced rubber components, supplying major Japanese manufacturers as well as leading companies across Europe, the United States, and other global markets.

Our commitment is to deliver high-quality, reliable products tailored to customer needs. We offer customized solutions including precision molded parts, diaphragms, and insert molding.

We also operate transfer molding machines designed to minimize material waste, enabling environmentally responsible production.
Our Key Capabilities
Precision molded parts – 0.4 mm linear gaskets (H NBR, NBR)
Diaphragms – Durable EPDM
Drive rollers for laser printers
Insert molding – High-adhesion bonding of iron/SUS with EPDM, NBR, and other rubber materials
Transfer molding – Minimizes material loss
Urethane coating booth – In-house finishing capability
We look forward to supporting your business with our high-quality products and technical expertise.
ProductCategoryEn: Precision Mechanical Parts,Electronics & Industrial Components,Industrial Supporting Components

ExhibitorNameChs: KWLID (Jiangsu) Intelligent Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd
DescCht:
Kwlid (Jiangsu) Intelligent Equipment Manufacturing Co., Ltd. specializes in producing high-quality drag chain series, protective cover series, cantilever box series, oil mist and dust purification equipment series and chip conveyor series.

Located in Shenzhou Intelligent Manufacturing Industrial Park, Changshu City, Jiangsu Province, the company integrates R&D, production and sales, and is a large-scale supplier of mechanized equipment accessories in the domestic industry. We have advanced production technology and equipment, as well as an excellent R&D and design team. Our products are widely applied in CNC machine tools, welding equipment, automation equipment, glass machinery, stone machinery and many other industries.

Kwlid is committed to providing customers with satisfactory services with first-class quality and a good reputation. We sincerely seek cooperation with colleagues at home and abroad to contribute to the development of CNC supporting products.
ProductCategoryEn: Metal Cutting Machines - Others

DescCht:
Lamitech is a precision mechanical engineering and manufacturing company specializing in high-accuracy CNC machining and custom aluminum components for industrial applications. We provide machining solutions for customers in Japan and Vietnam with a strong focus on precision, stable quality, and reliable delivery.

Our main strength is precision machining of aluminum parts with complex geometry, tight tolerances, and high surface quality requirements. We have extensive experience machining various aluminum materials for industrial equipment, automation systems, electronics, machinery, and custom engineering applications.

In addition to aluminum machining, we also process stainless steel, steel, brass, and engineering plastics. Our services include CNC milling, CNC turning, prototype manufacturing, small-lot production, and mass production based on customer drawings and specifications.

With strong experience serving Japanese customers, Lamitech continuously improves manufacturing processes and quality control systems to meet strict technical standards. Our factory is equipped with modern CNC machines and inspection equipment to ensure consistent quality and efficient production.

Lamitech is committed to:

-High precision machining
-Strong expertise in aluminum components
-Stable quality control
-Competitive pricing
-Flexible production capability
-Fast communication
-On-time delivery
-Long-term partnership

We aim to become a trusted manufacturing partner for customers seeking reliable precision aluminum machining services from Vietnam.
ProductCategoryEn: Precision Mechanical Parts,Electronics & Industrial Components,Industrial Supporting Components

DescCht:
Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH – Precision in Machine Tools and Cutting Tools

Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH, headquartered in Pleystein, Germany, has been a technological leader in machine tools and precision cutting tools for decades. With around 350 employees, the company develops and manufactures solutions that are used worldwide in the automotive industry, mechanical engineering, and other high-tech sectors.

Machine Tools – Innovation with Tradition
As one of the leading manufacturers of whirling and keyseating machines, Leistritz offers highly efficient and precise production solutions for demanding applications. While keyseating machines are used in e.g. pump and agricultural technology, whirling machines are indispensable in drivetrain technology and the automotive industry. Our machines stand out for their highest accuracy, durability, and continuous development in close cooperation with customer requirements.

Precision Cutting Tools – Efficiency in Machining
Complementing its machine tool portfolio, Leistritz provides a comprehensive range of tailor-made cutting tools. The product spectrum includes among others milling cutters, drills, end-finishing tools, as well as innovative solutions. With customized solutions, Leistritz plays a key role in improving productivity and cost efficiency in machining processes.

Integrated Expertise from a Single Source
The unique strength of Leistritz lies in the combination of machine tool engineering and tool technology. Customers benefit from deep process know-how and perfectly aligned solutions – from development and manufacturing to application. This close integration not only ensures technological excellence but also creates sustainable competitive advantages for our partners.

With a strong focus on quality, innovation, and long-term collaboration, Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH is a trusted partner for companies that demand the highest levels of precision and efficiency in machining.
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Metal Cutting Machines - Others

DescCht:
Established in 2014, LIPHOCO is a Vietnam-based manufacturer and OEM supplier specializing in scaffolding systems, steel fabrication, CNC machining, and Fabrication Service.
Our main products include ringlock scaffolding, wedge lock scaffolding systems, steel shoring props, steel ladders, warehouse trolleys, laser-cut components, welded assemblies, and customized OEM metal products based on customer drawings and specifications.

LIPHOCO currently operates 2 manufacturing factories with a total production area of up to 16,000 m², strategically located only 40 km from Cat Lai Port, helping optimize logistics efficiency and export lead times for international customers.

Our facilities are equipped with CNC laser cutting machines, CNC bending systems, punching machines, robotic and manual welding lines, and strict quality inspection processes throughout every production stage. We are certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, EN12810 standards, and Sedex Membership, reflecting our commitment to quality, sustainability, and responsible manufacturing.

LIPHOCO proudly exports products and OEM manufacturing solutions to the United States, Japan, Mexico, the Netherlands, Australia, and other international markets. We are committed to providing reliable quality, competitive pricing, responsive communication, and long-term manufacturing partnerships for global B2B customers.
ProductCategoryEn: Machining Centres,Precision Mechanical Parts,Electronics & Industrial Components,Industrial Supporting Components

DescCht:
LKM's main business lines are standard mould bases, high precision interchangeable plates, custom-made mould bases, precision machining and mould components. LKM operates a number of production facilities in Asia, with a workforce of over 4000 employees and a portfolio of over 600 CNC machining centres.

Delivering genuine value
The life-time value of an injection or die-cast mould is a function of the longevity of a mould, the direct cost of mould, the indirect costs of fitting and maintenance services, and the simplicity of the production and ownership process. By combining our experienced workforce with advanced machining capabilities and a trustworthy business model, our customers find using LKM products is a highly effective way to reduce long-term and hidden costs, thereby maximising long-term value.

Industry recognition
In many Asian markets, the LKM Standard is associated with quality and reliability. LKM is regarded as a highly reliable partner in the manufacturing value chain by end-users in electronics, automotive and medical equipment industries. Many end-users list “LKM-sourced products” in their standard technical requirements, and consider this as the hassle-free way to upgrade the long-term value of their mould projects.

Innovations:
First company in Greater China to use CNC machining centres for mould base manufacturing in 1987
Upgraded manufacturing process to CNC-machining-centre-driven, fully replacing traditional milling and drilling machines
Created the first online certification system in mould base industry
Developed online platform for “add-on” machining services
Introduced more eco-friendly precision milling to replace grinding across standard products
With over 230 robotic arms, fully automated production of standard plates and parts.
ProductCategoryEn: Boring / Drilling / Tapping Machines,Die Casting Machines,Broaching & Shaping Machines,Mould and Die,EDMs & Wire-Cut Machines,Grinding Machines,Lathes,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Milling Machines,Machining Centres,Sawing Machines

DescCht:
LMS Technologies Vietnam is proud to be one of the 5 members of the LMS Group - headquartered in Singapore. With over 15 years of establishment and development, we have established our position in the Vietnamese market as the leading distributor of world-class Scientific Equipment and Engineering Consulting Services.

LMS is a trusted provider of advanced materials testing and analysis solutions, delivering cutting-edge technologies to support quality assurance and innovation across industries. As the exclusive distributor of hardness testers from Innovatest and universal testing machines and X-ray systems from Shimadzu, LMS offers precision solutions for evaluating mechanical properties and internal structures, helping customers ensure product reliability and compliance with global quality standards.

We provide comprehensive support, from specialized laboratory equipment for research and quality testing, to professional after-sales technical services and calibration according to ISO/IEC 17025:2017 (VILAS 1299) standards.
ProductCategoryEn: Coordinate Measuring Equipment,Material Testing Equipment,Precision Gauges,Precision Measurement Software,Fatigue & Strength Testing Equipment,Testing, Calibration & Inspection

DescChs:
LMS Technologies Vietnam is proud to be one of the 5 members of the LMS Group - headquartered in Singapore. With over 15 years of establishment and development, we have established our position in the Vietnamese market as the leading distributor of world-class Scientific Equipment and Engineering Consulting Services.

LMS is a trusted provider of advanced materials testing and analysis solutions, delivering cutting-edge technologies to support quality assurance and innovation across industries. As the exclusive distributor of hardness testers from Innovatest and universal testing machines and X-ray systems from Shimadzu, LMS offers precision solutions for evaluating mechanical properties and internal structures, helping customers ensure product reliability and compliance with global quality standards.

DescCht: Losma has been designing and building purification systems for machine tools since 1974. In over 50 years, it has developed its know-how, which translates into an efficient technical consulting service supporting customers from designing to installing turnkey systems. Losma is an international leading company in the filtration industry. The only one that can supply complete air and liquid depuration solutions. Our reliable and innovative solutions cover over 95% of the industry’s plant needs. Losma products are widespread worldwide and are renowned for their high efficiency, modularity and excellent value for money. Losma Group has a strong vocation for internationalization and export. Its headquarters is in Curno, near Bergamo (Italy), but it also maintains a presence with an office near Turin. It actively manages key markets within the industry through its four subsidiaries in Germany, Great Britain, India, and the United States. Moreover, the Losma Group exports to over 60 countries thanks to its capillary distribution network. Driven by the mission to make the work environment healthier, today, Losma is an innovative company providing a wide range of solutions for the production industry.
ProductCategoryEn: Cleaning Devices & Clean Air Systems

ExhibitorNameChs: M.A.i Automation Technology Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.
DescCht:
As part of our global M.A.i Group headquartered in Germany, our team in Penang, Malaysia proudly represents our international presence at the exhibition.

Since 1999, M.A.i has been one of the leading German companies in mechanical engineering and automation technology, developing and realising customised automation solutions for demanding customers in the automotive, electronics, medical, plastics and packaging industries.

At our Malaysian site, we support customers across Asia with expertise in:
- Assembly and testing automation
- Robot handling solutions
- Semi-automated workstations
- Camera-based and electronic testing technologies
- Systems for process data acquisition and traceability
- Our global network

With our headquarters in Germany and additional locations in China, Mexico, Serbia and Hungary, we ensure flexible, reliable and local support worldwide. Our Malaysian team combines German engineering standards with regional expertise – delivering automation solutions tailored to your needs.

DescCht:
Performance is everything Makino stands for and everything we stand behind.
Always has been. Always will be.

We build machines, systems and technologies you can rely on with certainty.
We never stop pushing the boundaries of faster speeds, tighter tolerance and longer lifespans. We always bring you more innovative technology and systems, deeper expertise and an attention to detail that stands for Quality First and above all.

Our promise is rooted in old-school pride of relentless craftsmanship. Every day, we strive to get better and resolve to work harder. Doing our unconditional best is more than a goal, it’s a responsibility we feel to our customers.

Today, our PROMISE OF PERFORMANCE drives everything we do for you.

You have a partner who’s with you and for you at every step
When you invite a Makino machine to your shop floor, it’s the start of a partnership. Makino is the collaborator who’s fully invested in helping you perform at the highest level.

We come through when you need it the most
You can depend on our machines and our people to get the job done – no matter what. Day after day after week after year, we work hard to live up to Makino’s reputation of reliability.

We measure our success by your success
Everything our machines do – and everything we do to build and support them – is centered around you.
We’re here to help you do your most important CNC machining work and meet your customers’ highest expectations.

Makino is more than our name. It’s our word.

DescCht:
Marposs a worldwide leader in Measurement, Inspection and Testing
Designs and manufactures a wide range of products and solutions from precision measurement of mechanical components before, during and after the manufacturing process, to process controls and machine tool conditions, from leak tests for all industrial sectors, to automatic assembly and control lines. Marposs is a primary supplier of the major automotive manufacturers, for both ICE and EV applications, as well as the aerospace, HVAC-R, biomedical, energy, consumer electronics and glass containers sectors.

DescCht:
MECHDARECARE INDUSTRY CO., LTD. located in Hubei, is a high-tech enterprise dedicated to the research and development of fine chemical products aimed at maintaining modern industrial equipment and processing mechanical parts. We engage in extensive collaboration with numerous domestic and international universities and research institutions, while also monitoring global scientific and technological trends and advancements. Our approach integrates product research and development with sales and technical services, tailored to the maintenance needs of industrial equipment and the production requirements of machining. We have established professional sales and service teams in major cities across the country to deliver the most scientifically sound equipment maintenance plans for industrial enterprises. Our offerings include timely and systematic products, on-site services for the safe operation of production equipment, and tailored solutions for process cleaning and rust prevention in machining production.
MECHDARECARE adheres to the product design principles of safety, environmental protection, and high efficiency, providing innovative products and services for cleaning, rust prevention, anti-corrosion, descaling, sealing, lubrication, and water treatment of electromechanical equipment and metal parts across various industries, including aerospace, mechanical processing, petrochemical, steel manufacturing, energy and power, transportation, and telecommunications.
MECHDARECARE embraces core values of dedication to the public interest, comprehensive capability development, and a commitment to continuous improvement. The company respects the principles of universal participation in sales and collective ownership, places a high priority on environmental protection, actively engages in enhancing the humanistic environment, and collaborates with partners to realize the vision of a 'blue sky and white clouds' for society!
ProductCategoryEn: Lubricants & Chemicals

DescCht:
Mglory is a certified manufacturer that is dedicated to providing advanced precision stamping tools and precision metal stamping services for a wide range of industries. Our commitment to quality is reflected in our ISO9001 and IATF16949 certifications, which ensure that our clients receive the highest quality products and services.
Over the past 15 years, we have grown into a technology-driven enterprise with 60 technicians and engineers among our total of 200 employees. Our team of experts is highly skilled in the design, production, and assembly of precision stamped parts, and we are constantly investing in new equipment and technology to stay at the forefront of our industry.
Our direct and indriect clients include some of the world's leading companies, such as Apple, Bosch, Mindray, and Schneider Electric. We are proud to be a trusted partner for these companies, providing them with the precision stamped components they need for their products.

DescCht:
MODUL gear cutting machines are the safe choice when it comes to precise and efficient manufacturing of gears. MODUL has repeatedly set new standards in innovative gear manufacturing technologies since 1950.
MODUL offers hobbing, chamfering and deburring and power skiving to cover the complete technology range for soft machining of gears. Skiving (hobbing of hardened gears) and our power skiving machine are also provided for hard machining of gears.
MODUL gear cutting machines are successfully used in many industrial sectors, including automotive and e-mobility, robotic, aerospace, railway, agricultural machinery and commercial vehicles, energy sector and at manufacturers of industrial components.
MODUL gear cutting machines are ideal for wheel-type gears and shafts for transmissions, shafts with multiple gears, gears made from special materials, gears on crankshafts as well as for milling and chamfering / deburring.
MODUL gear cutting machines deliver high productivity and flexibility for both single-piece or small-batch and mass production with a high level of automation and customization.
ProductCategoryEn: Grinding Machines,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Machining Centres

DescCht:
We are a Japanese manufacturer specializing in hydraulic press machines.
Our FB press machines hold the world’s top market share, and we have exported them to more than 30 countries worldwide.
In addition to our headquarters in Japan, we also have sales and service offices in South Korea, China, Thailand, Canada, and Germany, enabling us to provide comprehensive after-sales support globally.

Fine blanking processing, commonly referred to as “FB processing,” has become widely established as an economical manufacturing method that applies hydrostatic pressure to metal materials in order to enhance plasticity, allowing smooth full-surface shearing and three-dimensional forming of thick materials.

In FB processing, besides the shearing force, hydrostatic pressure is generated by using a blank holder force that clamps the material with V-shaped projections, as well as a counter pressure opposing the shearing force.
Dedicated FB presses are equipped with hydraulic control systems that independently adjust these forces, while also providing processing speeds of approximately 5–35 mm per second, together with high rigidity and precision.
ProductCategoryEn: Punching & Stamping Machines,Injection Molding Machines
