ExhibitorNameChs: NINGBO JXPC PNEUMATIC AUTOMATIC INDUSTRY CO.,LTD
DescCht: JXPC was founded in 2007,which now has been the profressional supplier of pneumatic components in china. JXCP started with air source treatment and valves around 30 years ago as state-owned enterprise. At present JXPC has 58 automatic and semi-automatic production lines and 200 employees. The main products of JXPC are air source treatment, valves, pneumatic fittings,pneuamtic cylinders and other pneumatic components. Especially, the FRL units and solenoid valve, which started earlier, have covered and local and overseas markets due to their quality equivalent to well-known European brands. Around 30 years experence in pneumatic field makes JXPC more and more professional, our R&D team achieve many technological breakthroughs and launch new products every year. We also customize nonstandard products and OEM for customers. Commitment to providing the best pneuamtic solutions for our customers is our constant pursuit. JXPC has built long term relationships with his customers while insisting on treating each other with sincerity,mutual benefit and innovation. High quality and excellent after-sales service have definitely become the image of JXPC, making  JXPC a well-known brand in the pneuamtic industry now. We are recruiting oversea agents to approach more and more international market. JXPC has now 30 agents in overseas market, will be gradually become the leader in pneumatic market.
ProductCategoryEn: Packaging,Process Automation Systems, Equipment, Materials & Accessories,Sensors & Actuators,System Intergration,Manufacturing Automation, Machinery, Equipment, Materials & Accessories

DescCht:
20 Years of Precision

Since our founding in 2006, NKO TOOL INC has been driven by a Passion for Excellence。 We deliver the Highest Level of Production anchored in our core philosophy: "Superior Technology, Reliable Quality." By integrating cutting-edge craftsmanship, we remain committed to Quality Assurance and constantly strive for Exceeding Your Expectations as a trusted global partner.
Industry Solutions
• Mold & Die: Specialized in Heat-Treated Materials。 We achieve high-speed machining for hardened steels through ultimate Precision and Stability。
• Precision Optics: Our industry-leading Micro-Diameter Tools meet the strictest requirements for nano-scale surface finishes in optical molds。
• Aerospace & Automotive: Mastering difficult-to-cut materials like Titanium and Nickel-based alloys with superior thermal shock resistance。
• Medical Engineering: Delivering medical-grade precision for implants and minimally invasive surgical instruments。 We ensure superior surface finishes and stability when machining biocompatible materials like Titanium, Stainless Steel, and Zirconia。
• Consumer Electronics & Special Materials: Custom solutions for Graphite, Ceramics, and Composites that eliminate wear and chip-sticking issues。

Superior Technology。 Reliable Quality。
Two Decades of Mastery, Exceeding Your Expectations。
Thank you for being part of our Passion for Excellence。

DescChs:
20 Years of Precision

Since our founding in 2006, NKO TOOL INC has been driven by a Passion for Excellence。 We deliver the Highest Level of Production anchored in our core philosophy: "Superior Technology, Reliable Quality." By integrating cutting-edge craftsmanship, we remain committed to Quality Assurance and constantly strive for Exceeding Your Expectations as a trusted global partner.
Industry Solutions
• Mold & Die: Specialized in Heat-Treated Materials。 We achieve high-speed machining for hardened steels through ultimate Precision and Stability。
• Precision Optics: Our industry-leading Micro-Diameter Tools meet the strictest requirements for nano-scale surface finishes in optical molds。
• Aerospace & Automotive: Mastering difficult-to-cut materials like Titanium and Nickel-based alloys with superior thermal shock resistance。
• Medical Engineering: Delivering medical-grade precision for implants and minimally invasive surgical instruments。 We ensure superior surface finishes and stability when machining biocompatible materials like Titanium, Stainless Steel, and Zirconia。
• Consumer Electronics & Special Materials: Custom solutions for Graphite, Ceramics, and Composites that eliminate wear and chip-sticking issues。

Superior Technology。 Reliable Quality。
Two Decades of Mastery, Exceeding Your Expectations。
Thank you for being part of our Passion for Excellence。

DescCht:
Founded in 1965, NRB was the first company to manufacture needle roller bearings in India. For over 60 years NRB has pioneered the leading edge of bearing technology, and today over 90% of vehicles on Indian roads run on NRB parts. Since its inception, NRB has grown beyond its signature product to offer a wide range of high-precision friction solutions not only in the automotive sector, but across all mobility applications.

NRB is the global benchmark for quality and innovative design in high-precision friction solutions. NRB Bearings is a recognized leader in needle roller bearings, conventional cylindrical roller bearings and has developed a new generation of lightweight drawn cup bearings.

DescCht:
NT Industrial Automation System Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009. We are a leading supplier of industrial automation systems and tooling management solutions. Over the past five years, we have delivered full-automatic production lines equipped with more than 700 sets of equipment for mainstream automobile manufacturers including SGM, SGMW, GWM, CHERY and FAW-VW. Our tooling management services support an annual output of over 2 million engine and transmission housings for leading automakers such as SAIC and SGMW.
In recent years, we have independently developed dedicated equipment and machining processes for core new energy vehicle components including motor housings and DHT housings, serving clients like BYD. We own a factory of over 5,000 square meters for equipment manufacturing, and supply high-grade machining centers, gantry machines, bridge-type machines and turning centers. We are capable of delivering turnkey full-automatic system projects for clients.

ExhibitorNameChs: OHMI PRESS WORKS AND FORGING CO., LTD.
DescCht:
Founded 74 years ago, the company is a pioneer in ring forging in Japan.
Rolling forging is a technique that enlarges a material from a small diameter to a larger one with very little material waste, making it an optimal method for producing ring products.
We are capable of forging rings from OD150mm to OD5000mm, and have the equipment to handle even a single piece.
Especially, we are the only company in Japan that can forge rings over OD4000mm.
We also have an experience of forging aluminum, copper, titanium, and other materials.
We mainly supply products to the bearing, construction machinery, and shipbuilding industries.
We have recently strengthened our capabilities in machining challenging materials, including aluminum and titanium, and are actively expanding our presence in the aerospace and semiconductor industries.

DescCht:
Industrial Guide Asia has been a trusted industrial platform since 2002, connecting businesses across Asia, parts of the Middle East, Europe, and the United States through our comprehensive industrial directory and media network.

What began as an industrial search directory has evolved into a dynamic storytelling and industrial media platform that serves the modern manufacturing and engineering community. Today, Industrial Guide Asia publishes six issues annually, covering a broad spectrum of industrial sectors including factory automation, manufacturing, power and green energy, plastics and packaging, metalworking, heavy machinery, oil and gas, marine and shipbuilding, Industry 4.0, precision engineering, additive manufacturing, and many more.

Each issue focuses on key industry trends, innovations, and expert discussions, providing valuable insights to industrial professionals and businesses throughout the region.

Our online platform, iiga.shop, enables users to search, buy, and sell industrial products all in one place. With products ranging across different tiers and pricing levels, our subscribers benefit from direct enquiry opportunities that help businesses stay ahead in a competitive market. The free enquiry feature ensures seamless communication between buyers and suppliers.

In addition, iiga.news and our Digital Magazine deliver daily news updates and bi-monthly publications featuring the latest industrial technologies, market developments, and exclusive industry insights. Readers can also enjoy our signature “22 Minutes” interviews with top industrial experts and innovators. Our digital magazine offers a unique “Read and Watch” experience, bringing interactive industrial content to life like never before.
You may also notice the clean and modern design of our new website. That’s because we built it entirely using No-Code technology.
ProductCategoryEn: CAD / CAM /CAE,Rapid Prototyping Systems

ExhibitorNameChs: ORIENTAL MOTOR ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD
DescCht:
Oriental Motor Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. is a leading provider of motion control solutions, offering a wide range of precision motors, actuators, and automation systems for industrial applications. As part of a global network with over 130 years of expertise, the company supports industries such as semiconductor, medical, electronics and factory automation with high-quality products, fast delivery, and tailored engineering solutions to meet diverse motion needs.

With a strong presence in the Asia Pacific region, the company delivers comprehensive support from product selection to after-sales service. Its portfolio includes stepper motors, servo motors, brushless motors, and integrated motion systems designed for reliability, ease of use, and energy efficiency. By combining innovation with practical application expertise, Oriental Motor helps customers improve productivity and optimize machine performance across various industries.

Ottolink (Hebei) Technology Co., Ltd. is located in the High-end Manufacturing Port of Daxing Airport Economic Zone, China. Focusing on high-end and intelligent manufacturing, our product portfolio covers high-performance metal cutting tools and high-precision machine tools, widely applied in energy, rail transit, automotive, aerospace, robotics, petrochemical, wind power and other sectors, delivering comprehensive solutions to customers.
As an integrated enterprise combining high-end manufacturing, international trade and application technology services, we house R&D centers, high-precision processing centers and inspection centers at our headquarters. With branches in Shandong, Jiangsu, Anhui, Hebei, Changxing, Xi’an and other locations, we have built a multi-site service and technical support network with global business reach.
Upholding the concept of innovation-driven development, we continuously enhance core competitiveness, address key technical bottlenecks in high-end manufacturing and domestic substitution, and support customers’ high-quality growth.

Founded in 2007, Penta Laser is a leading global provider of high-power laser cutting, laser welding, and intelligent manufacturing equipment and solutions.

Penta Laser is a high-tech group corporation specializing in R&D, production, sales, and service. With six major R&D and manufacturing bases globally, located in Wuhan, Wenzhou, Linyi, Xiangyang, and Yangzhou in China, as well as Florence, Italy, the company has fully incorporated advanced Italian laser processing technology and adheres to strict European standards. This ensures stable and reliable product performance while providing customers with efficient and standardized global after-sales services.

Currently, Penta Laser's products and services are available in over 100 cities across China and more than 30 countries and regions worldwide. The company consistently ranks among the top exporters of high-power laser cutting equipment in China's domestic industry. In 2025, Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Limited Company (referred to as "YOFC"; stock codes: 601869.SH, 06869.HK) completed the strategic acquisition of Penta Laser. With globally leading expertise in specialty optical fibers and fiber lasers, YOFC will integrate its core technologies to significantly strengthen Penta Laser's R&D capabilities in laser equipment. This collaboration will achieve vertical integration of the entire industrial chain, from core technology to end products.

Through our commitment to the core values of "Customer Focus, Accountability, Integrity, Innovation, and Stakeholder Benefits," Penta Laser relentlessly pursues its mission to drive technological innovation in laser applications. This dedication fuels our development of intelligent laser equipment and our pursuit of global leadership in the field.
ProductCategoryEn: Bending Machines,Laser Cutting & Laser Systems / Machines,Metal Forming / Sheet Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Coiling & Wire Forming Machines,Milling Machines,Machining Centres,Waterjet Cutting Machines,Sawing Machines

DescCht: Established in April 2008, Pi Photonics, Inc. specializes in the development of “HOLOLIGHT,” a highly directional LED lighting solution. Our products have been widely adopted across diverse sectors, including industrial inspection, event and architectural lighting, and experimental research at academic institutions. The HOLOLIGHT Series is a unique product line that combines high-brightness LED light sources with large-scale optical elements to project precise and diverse light patterns. This proprietary technology is patented in Japan, the United States, Europe, and China. In recent years, we have been dedicated to creating innovative applications for light, including our Safety Solution Business, which contributes to reducing occupational accidents in factories; our Spatial Staging Business, which creates new landscape value by leveraging local resources; and our Avian Control Business, which utilizes light to prevent bird-related damage.
ProductCategoryEn: Electronics & Industrial Components

DescCht:
Profiroll Technologies GmbH – Precision in cold forming

MACHINES, TOOLS AND PROCESSES FROM A SINGLE SOURCE
Profiroll Technologies GmbH develops and manufactures machines, tools and technologies for cold forming in Germany. Customers benefit from the integrated solution approach: machines, die and processes from one source.

CORE COMPETENCE: ROLLING TECHNOLOGY
The equipment portfolio includes CNC-controlled machines for thread, profile, spline and cold ring rolling. It is complemented by intelligent software solutions, sensor technology and process visualisation. With its e-Rolling product line, Profiroll also offers assistance systems for automatic temperature and hardness compensation, tool monitoring and quality assurance in continuous operation.

NEW: AXIAL SPLINE FORMING
With the newly developed PA 450 axial spline forming machine, Profiroll is expanding its portfolio with a process for the economical production of small internal splines. The tool profile is transferred to the workpiece in an axial process – ideal for components with small internal diameters, such as rotor shafts for electric motors.
 
INDUSTRY DIVERSITY
Profiroll's technologies are used in numerous industries: automotive and supplier industry, aerospace, energy and drive technology, wind power, and roller bearing and fastener industry. The processes for manufacturing heavy-duty and complex components are also used in the field of robotics.

CONTRIBUTION TO ELECTROMOBILITY
One focus of current development is on applications for e-mobility. These include, in particular, rotor shafts for electric motors and components for brake and steering systems. These markets are key drivers of Profiroll's corporate growth.

INTERNATIONAL ORIENTATION
In addition to its headquarters in Bad Düben, Profiroll has branches in China, Japan, the USA, India, Spain, Italy and Poland. Further partners in Europe, Asia and South America ensure a global sales and service presence.
ProductCategoryEn: Bending Machines,Gear Cutting,Mould and Die,Metal Forming / Sheet Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Presses & Shears,Coiling & Wire Forming Machines

DescCht:
Pully Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. specializes in manufacturing the "Pully" series of plate cutting machines, bending machines, rolling machines, and open-rolling leveling and cutting production lines. The company focuses on researching, developing, and producing high-quality flat sheet processing machinery, including CNC and conventional types of plate cutting machines, bending machines, rolling machines, and presses. Puli products are widely used in various manufacturing sectors such as aviation, automotive, shipbuilding, agricultural machinery, electrical appliances, instrumentation, medical devices, and hardware processing.
The company boasts a team of top-tier experts specializing in cutting, folding, rolling, and leveling production lines, with product quality and technical capabilities ranking among the industry leaders. With forward-thinking vision and a pioneering spirit, Puli Heavy Industry integrates advanced international technologies to continuously develop cutting-edge products, laying a solid foundation for establishing the renowned "Puli" brand. The company's products have secured a strong presence in both international and domestic markets, earning widespread recognition and acclaim from all sectors of society for their excellent cost-performance ratio and superior service.
Adhering to the principle of putting users first, the company designs and manufactures high-quality products tailored to user needs, serving domestic and international customers with innovative concepts and a pioneering spirit.

DescCht:
PUNCH Group is a manufacturer and seller of high-precision mold and die components. With over 50 years of machining expertise, we empower manufacturing operations across diverse sectors, including automotive, semiconductors, medical, aerospace, electrical, beverage and machine tool industries.
With our headquartered in Japan and manufacturing facilities in Japan, China, Malaysia, and Vietnam alongside a global network of sales offices, we deliver components directly from our factories to customers in over 40 countries worldwide.
Core Capabilities:
• Plastic Mold Components: Offering a vast lineup of over 3,500 items, including ultra-precision pins (tip diameters of 0/-0.002 mm) crafted via advanced machining and rigorous inspection.
• Press Die Components: Providing an extensive selection of 28,000+ items with specialized coating options (TiCN, DLC, etc.) to enhance performance and durability.
• Custom Special Orders: Utilizing an all-inclusive system to deliver bespoke parts based on client drawings—handling everything from primary fabrication to specialized surface treatments for quantities ranging from single prototypes to large-scale production.
ProductCategoryEn: Mould and Die

DescCht:
COMPANY INTRODUCTION: Q.C.S.L GROUP
Q.C.S AT MTA 2026 – SYNERGY FOR CONNECTIVITY AND LEADERSHIP

Coming to MTA Vietnam 2026, Q.C.S MECHANICAL is proud to introduce our enhanced business model – The Q.C.S.L GROUP Integrated Mechanical Ecosystem.
Formed through a strategic merger on March 6, 2023, between QCS Co., Ltd. (est. 2014) and QL Co., Ltd. (est. 2019), we provide a comprehensive "One-stop service" at Song Than 3 Industrial Park:

CNC Machining & Equipment Assembly: We specialize in high-precision components with intricate technical requirements. Our expertise extends across a wide range of materials, including Copper, Aluminum, Steel, Stainless Steel, Plastics, and semi-finished castings made of Cast Iron, Stainless Steel, Aluminum, and Steel.

Sheet Metal & Frame Fabrication: Our facility is equipped with modern systems, including CNC Laser cutting machines, CNC bending, advanced welding technologies (Laser-MIG-TIG-Robot), and professional surface finishing processes.

Integrated Business Model: Through deep integration between manufacturing and commerce (Business Networking), we optimize costs and ensure strict deadlines for our clients.

With over 12 years of industry experience and a clientele where 90% are Japanese enterprises, Q.C.S.L GROUP is committed to international quality standards. We possess a deep understanding of specialized requirements and are dedicated to meeting the most stringent technical standards of Japanese and global partners.
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Rollers,Precision Mechanical Parts,Casting, Forging & Fabrication Part,Electronics & Industrial Components,Industrial Supporting Components

DescCht:
ACER Group was incorporated in 1985 with two USA facilities located in California (Springwood Industrial) and New Jersey (Klim Industrial), along with a factory in Taiwan. We are the foremost leading manufacturer from Taiwan with full product line of vertical machine centers, CNC bed/knee type mills, precision manual mills, surface grinders and engine lathes. ACER Group is committed to providing total ACER service and support locally for total customer satisfaction.

For more than 38 years, we have been providing over 26,350 users the satisfaction for running the machine day in and day out. We have become the backbone of our manufacturing and we are determined to serve you for all your needs.

DescCht:
RDI Technologies is a Knoxville-based technology company specializing in high-tech vibration analysis and predictive maintenance. We are best known for pioneering Motion Amplification®, a proprietary video-processing technology that allows users to see and measure motion invisible to the naked eye.

Core Technology: Motion Amplification® The company’s primary innovation is turning standard video cameras into massive arrays of sensors.
Virtual Sensors: Their software treats every pixel in a video frame as an independent sensor. This allows for millions of data points to be collected simultaneously without physical contact with the machinery.
Visualization: The software amplifies subtle vibrations and movements, creating a video where the physical displacement is visually obvious. This helps engineers identify root causes—like structural looseness or misalignment—that would be difficult to spot using traditional "point-based" sensors like accelerometers.

Why It’s Significant
RDI's technology bridges the gap between complex data and human intuition. Instead of relying solely on "squiggly lines" (waveforms and spectrums), maintenance teams can watch a video of a machine vibrating in real-time. This makes it significantly easier to communicate technical issues to non-technical stakeholders and speeds up the repair process across industries like manufacturing, power generation, and aerospace.
ProductCategoryEn: Control, Measuring & Monitoring /Inspection Equipment,Coordinate Measuring Equipment,Dimensional Measuring Devices,Material Testing Equipment,Precision Gauges,Precision Measurement Software,Fatigue & Strength Testing Equipment,Testing, Calibration & Inspection

DescCht:
We are Rhythm Vietnam (Saigon) Co., Ltd - a member of Rhythm Group, the only manufacturer in Vietnam that handles metal stamping, heat-treatment, plating, overmolding/ insertmolding and solenoid coils under one roof - giving Japanese and global companies a single, trusted partner to localize their supply chain without sacrificing the quality standards they built at home.
Since our establishment in 1995, we have been engaged in the production of metal stamping products in Vietnam for more than 30 years. We can produce wide variety of shapes can be produced for various applications, including drawn products, terminals, busbars, yokes, plates, holders, brackets, elements, laminated cores, clamps, retainers, and calipers.
Our Vietnamese team of talented professionals brings together a wealth of experience and expertise to provide our customers with customised solutions that meet their stamping challenges and exceed their expectations. We offer in-house design and development of metal stamping dies. Progressive in-die tapping and in-die rivetting/crimping are also available. With our integrated production process starting from tooling, we can handle urgent changes in specification.
In addition to stamping products, we also produce insert molding parts, winding coils and assembly parts. Moreover, we have our own plating line, which enables us to cover the entire process from stamping raw materials through plating on those surface and assembling into modules.
Having all these in-house processes enables us to reduce production lead time and its cost.
Today, there are more than 40 million products made by our experienced Vietnamese staff and we handle an average of 500 types of products per month with a focus on automotive and two-wheelers as well as solar power generators, home appliances and motor assisted bicycles industries. We deliver products more than 80 customers not only within Vietnam, South East Asia but also to countries around the world.
ProductCategoryEn: Heat Treatment,Mould and Die,Precision Mechanical Parts,Electronics & Industrial Components,Industrial Supporting Components

DescCht:
Established with their head office in Hong Kong in 1998, Ringier Trade Media Ltd., the company has offices in 13 locations across China, plus Hong Kong China, Taiwan China, Singapore, and the Philippines. From print media to integrated multimedia solutions Ringier Trade Media Ltd has consistently been a front runner in the application of new communication technologies. As a leading B2B industrial information provider the company has successfully promoted industrial development for the past 27 years. With a focus on quality content, industry knowledge, and excellent service to the communities we serve our various media channels connect and engage with industry experts , suppliers and users.

International Metalworking News for Asia (IMNA) delivers print magazines, digital e-magazines, and multimedia-rich online platforms with embedded video content—facilitating technology transfer by keeping readers informed of the latest industry news, trends, and innovations. For over 20 years, IMNA has supported manufacturing professionals across Asia by providing practical solutions that help improve productivity, reduce costs, and transform innovation into real competitive advantage.

IMNA’s readers rely on the publication for in-depth technical information and real-world applications across key manufacturing disciplines, including metal cutting, laser processing, tooling and workholding, software and controls, metrology, welding, and metal forming and fabrication. This content supports business planning and strategy development while enhancing product quality, process stability, equipment reliability, operator safety, and overall profitability—enabling manufacturers to capitalize on emerging opportunities across the Asia region.

DescCht:
ROENTGEN BAND SAW BLADES, founded by Robert Röntgen, is a German manufacturer specializing in high-precision metal band saw blades for industrial applications. With decades of engineering expertise, we develop and produce cutting solutions that stand for reliability, efficiency, and maximum performance.

Our band saw blades are designed for demanding materials such as aluminum, steel, and special alloys, ensuring precise cuts, long service life, and reduced downtime. By combining advanced manufacturing technologies with continuous innovation, we deliver products that meet the highest quality standards and optimize our customers’ production processes.

We serve a wide range of industries, including metalworking, automotive, aerospace, and general manufacturing. Our close cooperation with customers enables us to provide tailored solutions that match specific applications and requirements.

At ROENTGEN, we are committed to more than just delivering products. We offer technical expertise, application support, and reliable service to help our partners achieve maximum productivity and efficiency.

As a globally active company, we are proud to support industrial customers worldwide with German engineering, durable products, and cutting-edge technology. ROENTGEN BAND SAW BLADES stands for precision, innovation, and long-term partnership.
ProductCategoryEn: Blades

DescCht:
Established in June 2008, SAEILO Vietnam was the representative of SAEILO Thailand in Vietnam which belongs to SAEILO Japan Inc Group, specializing in providing high-quality CNC machines from Japan and CAD/CAM/CAE software.

Since October 2018, SAEILO VIETNAM CO., LTD has officially established and has become the distributor of CAMBRIO to provide CIMATRON software in Vietnam that is applied in making the mold and mechanical processing industry. Besides, SAEILO is also the distributor of Moldex3D, GO2cam, Fikus Visualcam, Dr. PRO... In particular, SAEILO specializes in providing machine tools for processing new technology such as STAR, SEIBU, and OKK.

SAEILO's orientation is always toward an after-sales policy to support customers. We always think every customer comes to us; they are business partners and our close friends. Therefore, we always improve technology, innovate, upgrade to serve, and bring the best solutions to customers a long way.
ProductCategoryEn: CAD / CAM /CAE,Die Casting Machines,Mould and Die

DescCht:
Established in 1970 in Osaka, Japan, SAN-EI initially started as a company specializing in metal stamping processing. Over more than 50 years of development, the company has expanded its manufacturing capabilities to cover the entire production process, from design, plastic molding, and secondary processing to mold assembly, meeting a wide range of customer requirements both domestically and internationally.

In order to expand its market and supply capabilities, in August 2013, SAN-EI officially invested in Vietnam and established SAN-EI VIETNAM ONE MEMBER CO., LTD. in Long An Province. This is our only factory in Vietnam, specializing in the production of mechanical and metal products in accordance with the strict quality standards of Japan.
ProductCategoryEn: Mould and Die

DescCht: Our company was founded in November 1968 with the aim of manufacturing innovative diamond pellets (trademark Dialette) for precision grinding using diamond micro-powder. Up to the present day, with the support and cooperation of the optical industry, we have developed products such as various metal-based and resin-based pellets, and sintered diamonds. These have contributed to improvements in grinding accuracy and reductions in polishing time in the precision grinding of optical camera lenses, optical instrument lenses, eyeglass lenses, and so on. In recent years, leveraging our expertise in precision diamond polishing, we have started to develop, produce, and sell abrasives for polishing metals. These new products give shine to any and all metals, including those used in construction, interior fixtures, furniture fittings, decorative metal bases, and eyeglass frames, thereby enhancing their commercial value.
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Jigs & Fixtures,Blades,Rollers,Material Handling & Storage

DescCht:
Hand in hand for tomorrow

Together we shape progress
Technology is changing the world. Driving them forward like an engine. Accelerating, making processes more efficient and making people's lives easier. As a team, we realize innovative solutions that make our customers better and better.

Our specialists have extensive know-how in toolholding and workholding, gripping technology and automation technology. In addition to individual high-tech components, we supply intelligent complete solutions for robot systems as well as for a wide variety of production and automation processes. Everything from a single source for individual customer applications.

Founded in 1945 by Friedrich Schunk as a small mechanical workshop, we have now evolved into an international technology company with around 3,700 employees in more than 75 countries – managed with foresight by the third family generation.

DescCht:
SEACAD was founded in 1998 as a value added reseller of SOLIDWORKS. Started with a small office setup, today is a brand name that is highly recognized and respected in the industry, earning a reputation for delivering productivity and proven results to Singapore’s leading MNC and SME design and manufacturing firms.

Over the last 20 years, we have carefully expanded our SOLIDWORKS and Partner Products portfolio, including overseas expansion to countries such as Vietnam and Indonesia. SEACAD has established two subsidiary companies, SEACAD TECHNOLOGIES VIETNAM COMPANY LIMITED and PT SEACAD Technologies Indonesia. Today, SEACAD's customers are provided with the most comprehensive and fully integrated solutions. With our experience and expertise, we are able to ensure the products we provide meet and exceed customer expectations.

Our SOLIDWORKS and Partner Solutions encompass a wide range of Engineering disciplines, including 3D Mechanical and Electrical & Electronic Design, Piping, Finite Element Analysis, CNC Manufacturing, Additive Manufacturing, Documentation, Data Management, and many more.

Shandong Handemo Technology Co., Ltd. is a large-scale CNC machine tool manufacturer in Shandong Province with over 20 years of production experience. Covering an area of ​​220,000 square meters, it employs over 1,000 people. The company is equipped with over 50 precision testing devices to ensure the quality of all equipment leaving the factory.

DescCht:
WE PROVIDE DEEP HOLE DRILLING & HONING SOLUTIONS
HTT, founded in Shanghai in 1997, is focusing on deep hole drilling and honing technology. The main business includes machine design & manufacturing, jobshop, tools& & accessories, machine rental and used machine service.
In 2006, Shanghai Ningyuan Precision Machinery Corp. was established by independent business of machine design & manufacturing and jobshop. Through years of careful layout, HTT has its own sales network in China and even the world. HTT has more than 10 branches in Tianjin, Qingdao, Xi 'an, Wuxi, Taizhou, Hangzhou, Changshu, Changzhou, Jiaxing, Dongguan, etc., to provide customers with deep hole drilling jobshop and machine display services.
Meanwhile, we also have our own sales offices in Beijing, Qingdao, Xi 'an, Dalian, Chongqing, Guangzhou, Dongguan and other places. More latitude, depth of service mode, allows us to provide customers with complete deep hole drilling and honing technology solutions!

DescCht:
Sheemetz Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based manufacturing and engineering company specializing in precision sheet metal fabrication, welding, coating, and assembly. Since its founding in 1947, the company has combined the spirit of Japanese “monozukuri” craftsmanship with advanced digital manufacturing technologies to deliver high-quality products.

Sheemetz provides fully integrated in-house production services, covering laser processing, precision bending, fiber laser welding, machining, coating, and final assembly. This end-to-end production system enables flexible and efficient manufacturing, including:
・Small-lot, high-mix production (including single-unit orders)
・High quality stability (defect rate: 0.02%)
・Short lead times (approximately 1 week)
・Value engineering (VE) proposals
・Flexible and highly customized manufacturing solutions

As a team of skilled manufacturing professionals, the company continuously invests in advanced production equipment and develops proprietary systems such as production management software, camera-based monitoring systems, and scheduling tools. These technologies enable full process visibility, enhanced operational efficiency, and advanced traceability across all manufacturing stages.
ProductCategoryEn: Precision Mechanical Parts

DescCht: SMS Precision Machines GmbH, established in 1995, is one of the leading companies producing high-precision, CNC-controlled thread grinding machines for external and internal threads. With about 85 employees SMS produces worm- and thread grinding machines for various applications such as grinding of worms, ball-screws, thread-gauges, taps, hobs and shaper cutters. Located in the strong and powerful German southwest, annually nearly 40 machines are produced on 1500 m2 assembly area. Each machine comprises a state-of-the-art CNC-control along with menu-guided, user-friendly dialogue software for shop-floor programming and is equipped with latest remote diagnostic capabilities. SMS maintains a quality management system to fulfil the requirements of ISO 9001:2015. More than 60% of the machines are exported to end-users world-wide.
ProductCategoryEn: Grinding Machines,Lathes

DescCht:
Founded in 1906 (Meiji 39), we are an optical lens manufacturer with a history spanning over a century. Starting with research and manufacturing of glass, we have expanded our expertise to include optical lenses, prisms, special lenses, loupes, and other glass products. Additionally, we engage in the developping, manufacturing and sales of optical products and components such as macro zoom lenses, microscopes, various scopes, inspection equipment, and more.
Supporting cutting-edge optical technology, we have been continuously evolving over the century, always looking towards the future. In our pursuit of staying at the forefront, Sugitoh continues to create optical products that go beyond, taking steps towards the future. Our commitment is to relentlessly explore advanced optical technology, delivering high-quality products to our customers, and fulfilling our mission as we move forward.

DescCht:
We have numerous advanced production facilities capable of handling a wide variety of workpiece shapes, including vertical 5-axis machining centers, multi-tasking machines, and wire-cut EDM machines.
We are expanding our 5-axis machining x high-precision facilities and continuing to hone our technology so that we can meet all of our customers' needs, including short-term processing requests and difficult processing (5-axis machining, pipe bending, etc.).

We perform hand finishing such as deburring, drilling, tapping, mirror polishing, and seal surface polishing in areas that are difficult to reach by machine processing.
We own a variety of grinding machines and can handle processing with high precision flatness and parallelism.
We manufacture products responsibly under an integrated in-house system, starting with parts processing, welding, leak testing (vacuum/airtight), secondary processing, hand finishing, and final assembly.
We also produce a wide variety of products in small lots on a daily basis, and can accommodate customer product requests, consultations on processing details, and short delivery times.

We use the latest inspection equipment to perform precise measurements and evaluations to rigorously check the quality of product dimensions, appearance, etc. We also strive to improve quality by recording inspection results and managing information on product quality.

Suntec VN Company Limited was established in March 2023 as a wholly owned subsidiary of Suntec Co., Ltd. in the Long Duc Industrial Park in southern Ho Chi Minh City.

We decided to expand into Vietnam, the home country of our trainees, to strengthen the supply of products to both Japanese and local customers, as well as to enhance our business continuity planning (BCP).

We have appointed trainees who have honed their skills in Japan for over six years as local technical managers and are enhancing our in-house inspection facilities and equipment to establish a quality control system equival

Suzhou Dieneng Precision Tools Co., Ltd., is a professional manufacturer of synthetic diamondgrinding wheels - integrating superior technology, development design, and research andmanufacturing. Our company serves the manufacturing interests of all of Europe, North Americaand southeast Asia. We primarily produce super-hard tool products, precision tools, diamond andCBN grinding wheels and feature a variety of more than 300 different product specifications,each with an individual quality that rivals international standards. The current products includeresin, metal, ceramic bond diamond, and CBN type grinding wheels. DescCht:
Tailift Group is a Taiwan-funded enterprise specializing in customer service. The company was founded in 1973. Chairman Mr. Lin Xiwen led a group of professional engineering technicians to create its own brand based on the business philosophy of "Taiwan Technology Upgrading" and led the brand to the international market with professionalism, innovation and service.
In Tailift's 51-year history, our employees have always been one of our important assets. The average service experience of personnel in each department is more than 15 years. Our production team implements TPS management and establishes a TPS culture to ensure the precision and the quality of production, the members of Tailift are like a family, they have a simple culture and employees, and our team is committed to growing with our customers and moving into the future.
Since it began producing radial drilling machines in 1975, Tailift has successively developed logistics handling equipment (stackers), sheet metal processing equipment (NCT turret computer punch presses, laser cutting equipment, CNC folding machine equipment), automation Equipment (multi-axis tea press, machining center) and other products. Based on the excellent foundation of punching machines in the past 40 years, Tailift not only provides top-notch fiber laser equipment, but will also provide a full range of laser sheet metal technology solutions with complete laser applications in the future to create higher product value for customers.
ProductCategoryEn: Bending Machines,Laser Cutting & Laser Systems / Machines,Metal Forming / Sheet Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Presses & Shears,Coiling & Wire Forming Machines,Waterjet Cutting Machines

Our production team implements TPS management and establishes a TPS culture to ensure the precision and the quality of production, the members of Tailift are like a family, they have a simple culture and employees, and our team is committed to growing with our customers and moving into the future.
Since it began producing radial drilling machines in 1975, Tailift has successively developed logistics handling equipment (stackers), sheet metal processing equipment (NCT turret computer punch presses, laser cutting equipment, CNC folding machine equipment), automation Equipment (multi-axis tea press, machining center) and other products. Based on the excellent foundation of punching machines in the past 40 years, Tailift not only provides top-notch fiber laser equipment, but will also provide a full range of laser sheet metal technology solutions with complete laser applications in the future to create higher product value for customers.
ProductCategoryChs: Bending Machines,Laser Cutting & Laser Systems / Machines,Metal Forming / Sheet Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Presses & Shears,Coiling & Wire Forming Machines,Waterjet Cutting Machines

ExhibitorNameChs: Taiwan Machine Tool & Accessory Builders’ Association (TMBA)
DescCht: Taiwan Machine Tool & Accessory Builders’ Association (TMBA) was founded on Oct. 5th, 2007. TMBA is consisted of more than 800 members of machine tools, accessory, components, and tools companies. The supply chain with intimate cooperative relationship leads Taiwan machine tool industry to own excellent competitiveness on quality and price in the international market. Up to 90% of Taiwan machine tool and accessory industry is located in the central of Taiwan, especially at Taichung, the best cluster of machine tool industry in the world. The main mission of TMBA is to integrate the opinion of Taiwan machine tool & accessory, and establish industry development strategy with government to assist in promoting industrial upgrade, which will have Taiwan machine tool & accessory industry continually pursue innovation and R&D to produce high quality machine tools. Furthermore, TMBA is committed to exchange with advanced countries to link up with the world. In the same time, TMBA is dedicated to offer its member companies a comprehensive service package, such as industrial personnel training, overseas & domestic exhibition services, and market analysis information, etc.

DescCht:
Takaishi industry is an industrial precision rubber product manufacturer founded in 1948.

We mainly manufacture products that prevent leakage of air, gas, oil, etc. around the water by O-rings and rubber packing.

We trust our customers with our unique blending technology and high quality, and we do long-lasting transactions.

We have three factories in Japan, but in 2016 we expanded our plant in Ho Chi Minh City, where we can manufacture products with low costs. We also deliver products to Vietnam, Japan, and other countries.

If you have any problems with rubber, please contact us once by all means.

DescCht:
Our slogan is “CHALLENGE THE IMPOSSIBLE,” and we are committed to delivering high-precision products with short lead times. We operate four factories in Okayama Prefecture (including group companies) and one factory in Tottori Prefecture, Japan.
We specialize particularly in aluminum product manufacturing, and by having our anodizing division located within our factory premises, we are able to achieve fast turnaround and short delivery times.
We have more than 600 customers in Japan and a proven track record across a wide range of industries, including semiconductor manufacturing equipment, aerospace, industrial machinery, shipbuilding, railway, and automotive sectors.
We support everything from single-piece prototypes to mass production.

ExhibitorNameChs: THINH QUA TRADING SERVICE ONLY MEMBER COMPANY LIMITED
DescCht:
Thinh Qua Trading Service One Member Co., Ltd. (Vietnam) was established in 2008 and is located in Ho Chi Minh City, the largest economic hub and seaport of Vietnam. It serves as the first stepping stone for Thinh Qua's expansion into international markets, with a strong presence across Southeast Asia.

Currently, the company's headquarters is located at Mieu Ong Cu Intersection – Binh Chuan Ward, Thuan An City, Binh Duong Province.

The company primarily operates in the field of industrial machinery, including CNC machining centers, laser cutting machines, welding equipment, mold processing machines, mechanical stamping equipment, hydraulic presses, EDM machines, and other related products.

In addition, the company owns a modern 5,000 m² showroom that integrates product display, warehousing, and office space, providing customers with a one-stop purchasing solution for mechanical equipment. With comprehensive after-sales services and a strong maintenance team, the company is committed to delivering fast, efficient, and high-quality after-sales support to its customers.

At present, the company has expanded its presence with additional branches in Bac Ninh (Hanoi) and Hai Phong in Vietnam, as well as in Shanghai, Jiangsu, Xi'an, Zhejiang, and Anhui in China.China.

DescCht: With nearly 40 years of expertise, Tien Thinh specializes in high-precision enameled wire in a comprehensive range of sizes—from ultra-fine to ultra-large—engineered for global industry leaders. Trusted by companies such as Toyota, Toshiba, TTI, Honda, Brother, Mitsui, and Sumitomo, we deliver superior quality, optimized production costs, and responsive technical support tailored to customer needs. Our portfolio includes Copper Wire (0.05–3.00mm), Aluminium Wire (0.10–3.50mm), and specialty wires such as LITZ, USTC, and KAPTON, available in various enamel types and thermal classes from 130°C to 220°C. All products comply with UL, JIS, IEC, NEMA, and GB standards.

ExhibitorNameChs: Tri-Wall Vina Pack Co., Ltd (Rengo Group)
DescCht:
Tri-Wall Vina Pack Co., Ltd., a member of the global Rengo Group, is a premier manufacturer specializing in heavy-duty and industrial packaging solutions. Operating with 100% Japanese investment, we are dedicated to providing high-quality, innovative, and environmentally friendly packaging materials that optimize logistics, transportation, and storage costs for our clients.
Our core product offerings include:
• Tri-Wall Boxes: World-renowned heavy-duty corrugated containers for international shipping, capable of replacing traditional wooden or metal crates.
• Tri-Wall Pallets: Durable, lightweight corrugated pallets, alongside premium wood, plywood, and plastic pallets.
• Octabins: Bulk material corrugated containers for granular products.
• Hybrid Packaging: Tailored solutions combining corrugated board, plywood, plastic, and steel.
• Standard carton boxes, sheet pallets (slip sheets), returnable boxes, and various packaging accessories.
With advanced manufacturing facilities in Vietnam (Yen My II Industrial Park, Hung Yen & Long Duc Industrial Park, Dong Nai) and strict adherence to ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 standards, we offer flexible end-to-end packaging solutions—from design and small-lot production to large-scale global supply. Our mission is to ensure the safe, efficient, and sustainable transit of your goods worldwide.
ProductCategoryEn: Packaging

DescCht:
Established on February 28, 2013, in Hung Yen, TSK Vietnam is a company with 100% Japanese foreign direct investment (FDI). With over 12 years of operation, TSK Vietnam is proud to be the leading Japanese manufacturer of vacuum-formed plastic packaging in Vietnam.
With our flexible customization capabilities to meet the specific needs of each customer, we are confident in providing our customers with the best packaging solutions at the most reasonable prices. Currently, TSK Vietnam offers a wide range of products, including various types of trays, molded plastic blisters, Danpla boxes, cardboard boxes, and PE foam, as well as optimized solutions for packaging.
We package electrical and electronic components, automotive parts, household goods, and other products for demanding markets such as Europe, the United States, and Japan, as well as for Japanese foreign-invested enterprises (FIEs) in the Vietnamese market.

DescCht:
Tyrolit is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of grinding and dressing tools, as well as a system provider for the construction industry. For over 100 years, our innovative tools and solutions have played a crucial role in technological advancements across various industries.
With roots in the heart of the Austrian Alps, Tyrolit combines the strengths of family values with a global vision and over a century of individual corporate and technological experience.
We aim to impress both internal and external target groups and foster fair, enduring partnerships. In pursuit of our goals, we consistently optimize the quality of our products and services while continuously adjusting our business processes to meet evolving market demands.
Our global supply chain management ensures on-time delivery of products to customers worldwide. Investments in research and development, employee training, and technological advancements are core elements of our corporate culture.

DescCht:
With total sales of over USD 1.5 billion, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is one of the largest machine tool manufacturers in the world. With around 5,000 employees at over 50 global production, service and sales locations, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is close to its customers and highly efficient.

The group is organized into two divisions: UNITED GRINDING and UNITED MACHINING.

UNITED GRINDING includes the brands MÄGERLE, BLOHM, JUNG, STUDER, SCHAUDT, MIKROSA, WALTER, EWAG and IRPD. Its technologies include surface and profile grinding machines, cylindrical grinding machines, machines for tool machining and machine tools for additive manufacturing.

The UNITED MACHINING division includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. It includes machines for EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), high-speed milling and laser technology as well as spindle production and automation solutions.

DescChs:
With total sales of over USD 1.5 billion, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is one of the largest machine tool manufacturers in the world. With around 5,000 employees at over 50 global production, service and sales locations, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is close to its customers and highly efficient.

The group is organized into two divisions: UNITED GRINDING and UNITED MACHINING.

UNITED GRINDING includes the brands MÄGERLE, BLOHM, JUNG, STUDER, SCHAUDT, MIKROSA, WALTER, EWAG and IRPD. Its technologies include surface and profile grinding machines, cylindrical grinding machines, machines for tool machining and machine tools for additive manufacturing.

The UNITED MACHINING division includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. It includes machines for EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), high-speed milling and laser technology as well as spindle production and automation solutions.

VAN SU LOI MANUFACTURING - TRADING COMPANY LIMITED was established in May 2004. It is a technical service company specializing in providing internationally renowned machinery and equipment in Vietnam, while also offering comprehensive pre-sales, in-sales, and after-sales solutions.
The types of machinery and equipment provided by Van Su Loi Company include Precision machining machinery, Cutting machines, Laser machines, Sheet metal machinery lines,...

DescCht:
VERNAL has been dedicated to manufacturing custom parts and assemblies for the past 40 years. We offer a range of services, including forming, machining, assembly, and precise measurement verification. As a trusted solution provider and technical supporter, we collaborate with our customers in the early stage of product development to meet their high-quality requirements. Our team of experts works diligently in a well-designed and employee-friendly environment to fulfill each customer’s unique needs.

VERNAL is proud to present our new product line, VERNALCO, which specializes in driven tool holders for Swiss type CNC machine. Our exceptional capabilities enable us to design and fabricate such holders to meet the demands of high-precision machining. We ensure the quality of each holder through rigorous precision monitoring, conducting production and inspection in controlled environments with appropriate temperature and humidity levels. Additionally, all holders must pass dynamic tests before they are delivered. By continuing to enhance production capacity, Vernalco is prepared to deal with a broader range of machining requirements.

VERNALCO is on a par with established firms in terms of the precision and quality of driven tool holders. In addition to possessing impeccable high-precision fabrication skills and offering diverse products, we also have the ability to satisfy custom requirements for driven tool holders and can adjust our operations to fulfill various machining needs. This gives our customers and us confidence that we can tackle any difficult challenges that may arise
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Jigs & Fixtures,Lathes,Material Handling & Storage

VINSTON founded in 2001, is a professional manufacturer of CNC Multi-Axis spring and bending machines. We are also the first manufacturer in China to modify camless machinery architecture to facilitate the manufacturing of bus bars.
Since the establishment of the VINSTON brand in 2001,our machines havehelp the manufacturing industry in more than 20 countries. We strive toprovide quality machinery and excellent customer service. Commited tosolving customer application problems, our R & D is constantly at work toprovide the next generation of machinery that encompasses support for alarger array of designs and builds. With sales and support centers instrategic locations on four continents, VINSTON provides the world withwire manufacturing solutions.

DescCht:
VSP VIETNAM MECHANICAL CO.,LTD is a company specializing in precision mechanical in Vietnam with many skilled engineers and workers who have many years of experience working in Japan. We design and manufacture machine parts details, jig, unique products with complicated profile and tolerance as request of the customers.
In order to satisfy the needs of the customers, we have well equipped with high-tech machinery and tools from Japan such as CNC Milling Machine, CNC Lathe Machine, Grinding Machine, CNC Wire-cutting Machine, Coordinate Measuring Machine, etc... We assure that the customers will be pleased with our products.
Our goal is to contribute to the precision mechanical industry in Vietnam, meet the domestic and foreign standards, reach out and become well-known to the world.
Our motto is to constantly create jobs and a democratic working environment for employee, promote creativity and dedication, regularly train the employees to approach new processing technologies.

DescCht:
Forming Innovations since 1893

Technical innovations have determined the rise of WAFIOS ever since the first wire fencing machine was developed. More than 130 years of experience in the wire and tube processing industry have made WAFIOS an internationally renowned name for quality. We are proud of our tradition, and to this day its strongest stabilizer is the innovative corporate culture and the proverbial inventive spirit of our Swabian homeland.

We develop, design, and produce sophisticated machinery for the wire and tube-processing industry and for cold-forging applications. The classic range of products it supplemented by solutions for current topics, like e-mobility, digitization and Industry 4.0.

Innovation and research are a driving factor here. Different subsidy programs, like e.g. for the e-mobility and sustainability sector, help us in the development of trend-setting technologies. Since 2021, we have received the award of the BSFZ seal by the Certification Body for Research Grants (in German: Bescheinigungsstelle für Forschungszulage, BSFZ for short) for Innovation Competence in Research and Development.
ProductCategoryEn: Bending Machines,Laser Cutting & Laser Systems / Machines,Metal Forming / Sheet Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Presses & Shears,Punching & Stamping Machines,Injection Molding Machines,Coiling & Wire Forming Machines,Waterjet Cutting Machines

DescCht:
Walter is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of cutting tools. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Tübingen, Germany, the company develops, manufactures and supplies precision tools for the metalworking industry. This includes products for milling, turning, holemaking and threading applications – as well as matching tool adaptors and services.
Walter takes a holistic approach that brings together all the essential components of machining and reduces complexity for customers. The company’s entire range helps customers to achieve alignment of their production in a cost-effective, efficient and reliable manner.
With its complete solution concept, Walter positions itself as an end-to-end partner. This covers the entire machining process: from high-performance standard tools and custom special tools to tailor-made process solutions. This offering is complemented by innovative apps and software solutions for digital connectivity. Altogether, Walter provides tailored solutions for a wide range of requirements in the metal industry.
Walter is at home in numerous sectors, including general mechanical engineering, aerospace, automotive and energy. In all these areas, the company supports its customers in machining components made from a wide variety of metal materials with precision, cost-effectiveness and reliability. This is embodied by the company’s brand promise - Engineering Kompetenz.
ProductCategoryEn: Gear Cutting,Jigs & Fixtures,Blades,Rollers,Material Handling & Storage

ExhibitorNameChs: WUXI ZHOUXIANG COMPLETE SET OF WELDING EQUIPMENT CO LTD
DescCht:
Zhouxiang Group is established in 1991, covers an area of more than 100,000m2, fixed assets CNY200 million, with more than 400 staff, including 100 , 20 Doctor and Master, and several domestic and foreign industry experts and staff. Zhouxiang is a high-tech enterprise which combines science and technology, industry production and trade into one, took the lead in the adoption of ISO9001:2015 quality management system certification, CE certification, etc. The company is located in Wuxi, the key city of the Yangtze River Delta, which is adjacent to Shanghai and has a unique production and sales advantage. The key members of Zhouxiang Group are Wuxi Zhouxiang Complete Set of Welding Equipment Co.,Ltd and Wuxi Zhouxiang Laser Machinery Co.,Ltd
Wuxi Zhouxiang Complete Set of Welding Equipment Co.,Ltd mainly research, manufacture and sell products like H beam production line, Box beam production line, Welding manipulator, rotator, CNC flame/plasma cutting machine, Edge milling machine, CNC drilling machine, Plate rolling machine, Wind tower production line, etc. It is one of the biggest professional bases for large-scale welding equipment in China. These products are widely used on ship/car building, marine engineering, military machinery, engineering machinery, chemical machinery, petrochemical equipment, environmental protection equipment, power tower, wind tower, nuclear power, boiler, building and steel structure.
Wuxi Zhouxiang Laser Machinery Co.,Ltd is engaged in researching, production and sales of laser cutting, welding, cladding, quenching, 3D printing, and flexible production line. Main products have medium/high power CO2 laser cutting machine, Fast fiber laser cutting machine, Fiber laser tube cutting machine, 3D robotic laser cutting and Robotic arc welding center. DescCht:
Xinxiang Zhongyue Filter Co., Ltd.(FocusFiltration) is a research-oriented enterprise dedicated to the research and development, production, and sales of industrial filters. The factory is located in Fengquan Industrial Agglomeration Zone, Xinxiang City, Henan Province, with an area of 10000 square meters and more than 90 employees. The factory has over 70 production equipments and more than 10 testing equipments.

The company's R&D team is led by senior engineers with over 30 years of experience in the filtration industry, and has close technical cooperation and exchanges with many domestic universities and research institutes. At the same time, we have more than 20 years of experience in the research and manufacturing of industrial filters, and have established a technical database. With the expertise of our professional design team, we can provide clients with professional technical solutions.

Our company creates high-quality and stable filter products for you with first-class technology, rich experience, stable and high-quality raw materials, advanced equipment, scientific experimental and testing methods, professional technicians and skilled workers.

DescCht:
Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. | Professional Manufacturer of Shot Blasting & Surface Treatment Equipment

Founded in 1976, Yaw Sheng Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. has over 40 years of experience in the surface treatment equipment industry. We are a leading Taiwanese manufacturer specializing in sand blasting machines (shot blasting machines, shot cleaning machines), blasting rooms, and automated surface treatment systems.
Adhering to our core philosophy of “Quality First, Customer Foremost,” we are committed to continuous equipment R&D, process optimization, and technological innovation. Over the years, we have evolved from a single equipment supplier into a comprehensive provider of integrated surface treatment solutions, serving a wide range of industries both domestically and internationally.

Products & Equipment
We offer a diverse range of surface treatment equipment, all of which can be customized based on production capacity and workpiece requirements:
Sand Blasting Machines
Shot Blasting Machines
Blasting Room Turnkey Solutions
Conveyor-Type Automated Surface Treatment Systems
Customized Special-Purpose Equipment Design & Manufacturing
From standalone machines to complete plant planning, we provide total solutions to meet various industrial process needs.

Customization & System Integration Capability
Our experienced R&D team provides tailored solutions based on:
Workpiece size and weight
Production cycle time and capacity requirements
Surface treatment quality expectations
On-site space and workflow planning
We deliver optimized equipment configurations and integrated systems to help customers enhance automation and overall production efficiency.

Brand Philosophy
Guided by our brand vision as a “Benchmark in the Surface Treatment Industry,” Yaw Sheng Machinery continues to advance technology, enhance quality, and strives to become a trusted global partner in the surface treatment equipment industry.

DescCht:
YIH KUAN ENT CO., LTD. is a professional milling head manufacturer based in Taiwan, with nearly 50 years of experience in design and manufacturing. We specialize in the development, production, and application integration of various types of milling heads. Our main product range includes turret milling heads, gantry (plano) milling heads, and angle heads, which are widely applied in conventional milling machines, gantry machines, and various machining equipment. We are also capable of recommending suitable configurations based on different machining requirements.

In addition to manufacturing high-quality milling heads, YIH KUAN has extensive experience in machine retrofitting and upgrading projects. Based on the customer’s existing machine conditions, applications, and operational needs, we provide practical and effective upgrade solutions. We believe that a milling head is not just an accessory, but a critical component that directly affects machining efficiency, stability, and the overall value of the machine. With the right milling head upgrade and integration, customers can significantly enhance performance without replacing the entire machine.

Our core values are built on professionalism, reliability, and long-term partnership. Supported by a strong and experienced team in R&D, manufacturing, assembly, and after-sales service, we ensure strict quality control at every stage. YIH KUAN is not only a milling head manufacturer, but also a trusted partner in helping our customers achieve efficient and sustainable machining solutions.
ProductCategoryEn: Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Milling Machines,Machining Centres

Driven by cutting edge technology and a portfolio of about 8,000 products, we are fully equipped to meet all of caster requirements across industries. Our extensive expertise allows us to deliver reliable, high performance solutions tailored to every application.
Our mission is “Bring happiness to people worldwide.” We are committed to continuous innovation, dedicating our efforts to creating smooth rolling casters that improve efficiency, safety, and comfort in every workplace.

DescCht:
We are a CNC Precision Parts Manufacturer with No MOQs and Fast Lead Times
Yumoto Vietnam Co., Ltd. is an ISO 9001–certified manufacturer specializing in CNC machined precision components, located in Tay Ninh Province, Vietnam.
With extensive expertise in machining a wide range of plastic and metal materials, we support projects from single-unit prototypes to mass production runs exceeding 1,000 units. For rapid prototyping services and small lot production of less than 10 units, our average lead time is 7 working days (EXW) from the date of purchase. For larger quantity orders, lead time will be case by case, but we can expedite production to meet urgent deadlines.
We can arrange shipment globally, and we have extensive experience exporting to the US, Germany, and Japan.

Field01: Kizuna 3 ready serviced factory, Tan Kim Expansion IP, Can Giuoc District, Tay Ninh Province, Vietnam
DescChs:
We are a CNC Precision Parts Manufacturer with No MOQs and Fast Lead Times
Yumoto Vietnam Co., Ltd. is an ISO 9001–certified manufacturer specializing in CNC machined precision components, located in Tay Ninh Province, Vietnam.
With extensive expertise in machining a wide range of plastic and metal materials, we support projects from single-unit prototypes to mass production runs exceeding 1,000 units. For rapid prototyping services and small lot production of less than 10 units, our average lead time is 7 working days (EXW) from the date of purchase. For larger quantity orders, lead time will be case by case, but we can expedite production to meet urgent deadlines.
We can arrange shipment globally, and we have extensive experience exporting to the US, Germany, and Japan.
ProductCategoryChs: Precision Mechanical Parts,Industrial Supporting Components

DescCht:
Zhejiang Zhicheng is a joint venture supported by Jingxing Paper Industry Group (Stock Code: 002067), combining the group’s financial strength with specialized expertise in precision manufacturing. Founded in 1993, the company has been deeply involved in the CNC machine tool industry for nearly 30 years. In 2010, it established Zhejiang Zhicheng Technology Co., Ltd.​ in Pinghu to achieve technological upgrades and scale expansion. With a registered capital of 30 million RMB, the company operates a large-scale manufacturing base covering an area of over 30,000 square meters, with a building area of 20,000 square meters.
The company specializes in CNC Gantry Integrated Machines, which combine automated material handling with high-efficiency processing. Our main product lines include:

Disc Part Machining: TT Series Parallel Twin-Spindle CNC Gantry Machine.

Shaft Part Machining: MW Series Opposed Twin-Spindle CNC Gantry Machine.

General Precision Machining: QT Series Precision CNC Gantry Machine.

A dedicated R&D team of over 20 technical professionals​ in mechanical, electrical, robotics, and software engineering, including one Japanese engineer and one Senior Engineer.

Long-term industry-academia collaboration with the Robotics Institute of Shanghai Jiao Tong University.

Holds more than 10 National Invention and Utility Model Patents, demonstrating a solid foundation of proprietary technology.

Global Sales Network: Our products are sold across China and exported to international markets.

Client Base: We primarily serve top-tier automotive manufacturers and their Tier-1 suppliers, including:

Leading Domestic Automakers: Such as SAIC Motor​ and FAW-Volkswagen.

Multinational Corporations: Serving numerous German and Japanese-funded​ companies within the domestic machinery industry.

Workforce: The company currently employs approximately 150 people, maintaining a lean and efficient operational structure.
ProductCategoryEn: Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Machining Centres

DescCht:
We are a Taiwanese company specializing in high-quality cutting tools, including end mills, drills, and reamers. Our products designed for various industrial applications, including CNC machining and metalworking. We focus on innovation, offering both standard and custom solutions to meet customer needs globally.
We’re certificated by Taiwan CNC training organization and indicated by vocational schools in Taiwan. We develop and make customized cutting tools for many field industries and training organization. Production area is about 20000 m2, which is the biggest development center in Taiwan market.

DescCht:
ZNK LASER is a professional supplier of high-quality laser cutting consumables and accessories, serving fiber laser cutting machine users, manufacturers, and distributors worldwide. Founded with the mission to deliver premium-quality parts at competitive factory-direct prices, we have built a comprehensive product portfolio covering the full spectrum of laser cutting needs.

Our Core Product Lines:

Laser Nozzles — Single-layer, double-layer, and high-pressure nozzles in copper, brass, hardened copper, and tungsten carbide. Available in diameters from D20 to D37, compatible with all major cutting head brands including Raytools, Precitec, WSX, and BOCI.

Protective Lenses & Windows — Raytools original and ZNK-branded protective lenses (24.9mm, 27.9mm, 30mm, 38mm), collimating lenses, and focusing lenses. All lenses undergo strict optical inspection and are shipped in anti-static packaging.

Capacitive Sensors & Probes — Height-following sensors and auto-focus probes for major cutting head models, ensuring precise and reliable cutting performance.

Cutting Head Accessories — Nozzle holders, adapters, water-cooling plates, ceramic rings, and complete spare parts kits for laser cutting heads.

Handheld Fiber Laser Marking Machines — Portable 20W–100W marking systems for metal and non-metal engraving, ideal for on-site industrial marking applications.

Laser Cleaning & Maintenance Tools — Professional cleaning kits, optical-grade lens paper, and maintenance supplies.

What Sets Us Apart:
8,000+ SKUs & 155+ brands — One-stop sourcing for all laser consumables
Factory-direct pricing — Up to 80–90% below typical market prices
In-stock fast shipping — Most orders ship within 3 business days
OEM & Customization — Custom packaging, branding, and specification support
Quality guaranteed — Every product undergoes rigorous quality inspection before shipment
Website: www.znklaser.com | Alibaba Store: ZNK Laser Technology Co., Ltd. Contact: Gavin Yuan | Email: info@znklaser.com
ProductCategoryEn: Engraving & Marking Systems

DescCht:
Fact Base is a SaaS startup for the manufacturing industry, founded in September 2022, with the mission of “making manufacturing seamless.”

Its core product, the drawing management system “ZUMEN,” was developed to enable digital transformation (DX) for small and medium-sized enterprises and local factories. In many manufacturing sites, paper drawings and related documents still play a central role in operations, and due to the complexity of managing them, accumulated data is not being fully utilized. “ZUMEN” addresses these challenges by centrally managing drawings and related documents in the cloud, significantly improving efficiency in complex management tasks. As a first step toward data utilization in manufacturing, it is being increasingly adopted by small factories and SMEs.
ProductCategoryEn: MES, Predictive Maintenance, Factory Management Systems
